Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Standard finite sets . Vladimir Voevodsky . Apr. - Sep. 2011 .

This file contains main constructions related to the standard finite sets defined as the initial intervals of [ nat ] and their properties . *)




(** ** Preamble *)

(** Imports. *)

Require Export UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.DecidablePropositions.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


(** ** Standard finite sets [ stn ]. *)

Definition stn ( n : nat ) := ∑ m, m < n.
Definition make_stn n m (l:m<n) := (m,,l) : stn n.
Definition stntonat ( n : nat ) : stn n -> nat := @pr1 _ _ .
Coercion stntonat : stn >-> nat.

n: nat
i: stn n
i < n


n: nat
i: stn n
i < n

  
n: nat
i: stn n
i < n

  exact (pr2 i).
Defined.


n: nat
i, i': stn n
H: pr1 i = pr1 i'
i = i'


n: nat
i, i': stn n
H: pr1 i = pr1 i'
i = i'

  
n: nat
i, i': stn n
H: pr1 i = pr1 i'
isPredicate (λ m : nat, m < n)

  
n: nat
i, i': stn n
H: pr1 i = pr1 i'
x: nat
isaprop (x < n)

  apply isasetbool.
Qed.

(* old way:
   Notation " 'stnel' ( i , j ) " :=
      ( make_stn _ _  ( ctlong natlth isdecrelnatlth j i ( idpath true ) ) )
      ( at level 70 ). *)

Identifier 'stnpr' now a keyword


Identifier 'stnel' now a keyword


Declare Scope stn.
Delimit Scope stn with stn.

Notation "⟦ n ⟧" := (stn n) : stn.
(* in agda-mode \[[ n \]] *)

Notation "● i" := (i ,, (idpath _ : natgtb _ _ = _)) (at level 35) : stn.


n: nat
isincl (stntonat n)


n: nat
isincl (stntonat n)

  
n, y: nat
isofhlevel 1 (hfiber (stntonat n) y)

  
n, y: nat
∏ x : nat, isaprop ((λ m : nat, m < n) x)

  
n, y, x: nat
isaprop ((λ m : nat, m < n) x)

  apply ( pr2 ( natlth x n ) ).
Defined.

Definition stntonat_incl n := make_incl (stntonat n) (isinclstntonat n).


n: nat
isdecincl (stntonat n)


n: nat
isdecincl (stntonat n)

  
n, y: nat
isdecprop (hfiber (stntonat n) y)

  
n, y: nat
∏ x : nat, isdecprop ((λ m : nat, m < n) x)

  
n, y, x: nat
isdecprop ((λ m : nat, m < n) x)

  
n, y, x: nat
isaprop (x < n)
n, y, x: nat
(x < n) ⨿ ¬ (x < n)

  
n, y, x: nat
(x < n) ⨿ ¬ (x < n)

  apply isdecrelnatgth.
Defined.

is: m ≥ n
¬ hfiber (stntonat n) m


n, m: nat
is: m ≥ n

n, m: nat
is: m ≥ n

∅

j: (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
e: j = m

n, m: nat
is: m ≥ n
j: nat
is': j < n
e: j,, is' = m
∅

  
n, m: nat
is: m ≥ n

is': j < n
e: j = m
∅

j: nat
is': m < n
e: j = m
∅

Defined.


n, m: nat
is: m < n
iscontr (hfiber (stntonat n) m)


n, m: nat
is: m < n
iscontr (hfiber (stntonat n) m)

  
n, m: nat
is: m < n
iscontr (hfiber (stntonat n) m)

  apply ( iscontrhfiberofincl ( stntonat n ) ( isinclstntonat n ) ( make_stn n m is ) ).
Defined.

i = j
 
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: stntonat n i = stntonat n j
pr1 i = pr1 j
 assumption.
  
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
hProptoType
  (negProp_to_hProp (stntonat n i ≠ stntonat n j))
→ i != j
 
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
hProptoType
  (natneq_hProp (stntonat n i) (stntonat n j))
→ i != j
 
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
neq: hProptoType (natneq_hProp (stntonat n i) (stntonat n j))
e: i = j
∅
 
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
neq: hProptoType (natneq_hProp (stntonat n i) (stntonat n j))
e: i = j
i = j
 assumption.
  Unset Printing Coercions.
Defined.

Defined.

  apply negProp_to_iff.
Defined.

Definition stnneq_to_nopath {n : nat} (i j: ⟦n⟧ ) : ¬ (i = j) <- i ≠ j
  := pr2 (stn_ne_iff_neq i j).

decidable (x = x')

Defined.


n: nat

n: nat
isaset (⟦ n ⟧)

  
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
∏ x' : ⟦ n ⟧, isaprop (x = x')

  apply ( isasetifdeceq _ ( isdeceqstn n ) ).
Defined.

Definition stnset n := make_hSet (⟦n⟧) (isasetstn n).

Definition stn_to_nat n : stnset n -> natset := pr1.

⟦ S n ⟧

  
n: nat
n < S n

  apply ( natgthsnn n ).
Defined.

i < S lastelement

  apply stnlt.
Defined.

⟦ S n ⟧

⟦ S n ⟧

0 < S n

  apply natgthsn0.
Defined.


n: nat
∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, firstelement ≤ i


n: nat
∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, firstelement ≤ i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
firstelement ≤ i

  apply idpath.
Defined.

Definition firstValue {X:UU} {n:nat} : (⟦S n⟧ -> X) -> X
  := λ x, x firstelement.

Definition lastValue {X:UU} {n:nat} : (⟦S n⟧ -> X) -> X
  := λ x, x lastelement.

(** Dual of i in stn n, is n - 1 - i *)

n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
e: 0 = n
∅


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
e: 0 = n
∅

  
i: ⟦ 0 ⟧
∅

  apply (negnatlthn0 _ (stnlt i)).
Qed.


i, n: nat
H: n > 0
n - 1 - i < n


i, n: nat
H: n > 0
n - 1 - i < n

  
i, n: nat
H: n > 0
n - (1 + i) < n

  
i, n: nat
H: n > 0
1 + i > 0

  apply idpath.
Qed.


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
H: 0 = n
⟦ n ⟧
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
H: 0 < n
⟦ n ⟧

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
H: 0 = n
⟦ n ⟧
 exact (make_stn n (n - 1 - i) (fromempty (dualelement_0_empty i H))).
  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
H: 0 < n
⟦ n ⟧
 exact (make_stn n (n - 1 - i) (dualelement_lt i n H)).
Defined.

Definition stnmtostnn ( m n : nat ) (isnatleh: natleh m n ) : ⟦m⟧ -> ⟦n⟧ :=
  λ x : ⟦m⟧, match x with tpair _ i is
                 => make_stn _ i ( natlthlehtrans i m n is isnatleh ) end.

m, n: nat
⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ m + n ⟧

  
m, n: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
⟦ m + n ⟧

  
m, n: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 i < m + n

  
m, n: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
m ≤ m + n

  apply natlehnplusnm.
Defined.


m, n: nat
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m + n ⟧


m, n: nat
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m + n ⟧

  
m, n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ m + n ⟧

  
m, n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
m + pr1 i < m + n

  
m, n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 i < n

  exact (pr2 i).
Defined.


m, n: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (stn_left m n i) = i


m, n: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (stn_left m n i) = i

i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (stn_left m n i) = i

m, n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧

m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
e: m = m + 0
stn_left m 0 i = transportf stn e i


m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
e: m = m + 0

m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
e: m = m + 0
stn_left m 0 i = transportf stn e i

  
m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
e: m = m + 0
pr1 (stn_left m 0 i) = pr1 (transportf stn e i)

  
m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (stn_left m 0 i) =
pr1 (transportf stn (idpath m) i)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


m, n: nat
m ≤ n → ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧


m, n: nat
m ≤ n → ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧

  
m, n: nat
le: m ≤ n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
⟦ n ⟧

  exact (make_stn _ _ (natlthlehtrans _ _ _ (stnlt i) le)).
Defined.


m, n: nat
m < n → ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧


m, n: nat
m < n → ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧

  
m, n: nat
le: m < n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
⟦ n ⟧

Defined.


m, n: nat
r: m ≤ m + n
stn_left' m (m + n) r = stn_left m n


m, n: nat
r: m ≤ m + n
stn_left' m (m + n) r = stn_left m n

  
m, n: nat
r: m ≤ m + n
stn_left' m (m + n) r = stn_left m n

  
m, n: nat
r: m ≤ m + n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
stn_left' m (m + n) r i = stn_left m n i

  
m, n: nat
r: m ≤ m + n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (stn_left' m (m + n) r i) = pr1 (stn_left m n i)

  apply idpath.
Defined.

(** ** "Boundary" maps [ dni : stn n -> stn ( S n ) ] and their properties. *)


n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧


n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ S n ⟧
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
di i x < S n
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end < S n

       
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
lt: x < i
x < S n
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
ge: x ≥ i
S x < S n

       
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
lt: x < i
x < S n
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
lt: x < i
n > x
 exact (pr2 x).
       
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
ge: x ≥ i
S x < S n
 exact (pr2 x).
Defined.


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni lastelement i) = pr1 i


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni lastelement i) = pr1 i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni lastelement i) = pr1 i
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
match natlthorgeh i n with
| inl _ => i
| inr _ => S i
end = pr1 i
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
q: i < n
i = pr1 i
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
q: i ≥ n
S i = pr1 i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
q: i < n
i = pr1 i
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
q: i ≥ n
S i = pr1 i
 contradicts (pr2 i) (natlehneggth q).
Defined.


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni firstelement i) = S (pr1 i)


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni firstelement i) = S (pr1 i)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni firstelement i) = S (pr1 i)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni lastelement i) = i


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni lastelement i) = i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni lastelement i) = i

  
n, i: nat
I: i < n
pr1 (dni lastelement (i,, I)) = i,, I

  
n, i: nat
I: i < n
pr1
  (match natlthorgeh (i,, I) lastelement with
   | inl _ => i,, I
   | inr _ => S (i,, I)
   end,,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : (i,, I < lastelement)
            ⨿ (i,, I ≥ lastelement),
      match c with
      | inl _ => i,, I
      | inr _ => S (i,, I)
      end < S n)
     (λ _ : i,, I < lastelement,
      natgthtogths n (i,, I) (pr2 (i,, I)))
     (λ _ : i,, I ≥ lastelement, pr2 (i,, I))
     (natlthorgeh (i,, I) lastelement)) = i,, I
 
n, i: nat
I: i < n
match natlthorgeh i n with
| inl _ => i
| inr _ => S i
end = i

  
n, i: nat
I, g: i < n
i = i
n, i: nat
I: i < n
g: i ≥ n
S i = i

  
n, i: nat
I, g: i < n
i = i
 apply idpath. 
n, i: nat
I: i < n
g: i ≥ n
S i = i

  
n, i: nat
I: i < n
g: i ≥ n
S i = i

  contradicts (natlehtonegnatgth _ _ g) I.
Defined.


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni firstelement i) = S i


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni firstelement i) = S i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni firstelement i) = S i

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧

(* this definition is simpler than that of [dni n (firstelement n)], since no choice is involved, so it's useful in special situations *)

n: nat
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧

  
n: nat
h: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ S n ⟧

  exact (S (pr1 h),, pr2 h).
Defined.


n: nat
dni firstelement = dni_firstelement


n: nat
dni firstelement = dni_firstelement

  
n: nat
dni firstelement = dni_firstelement

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
dni firstelement i = dni_firstelement i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni firstelement i) = pr1 (dni_firstelement i)

  exact (compute_pr1_dni_first n i).
Defined.


n: nat
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧

(* this definition is simpler than that of [dni lastelement], since no choice is involved, so it's useful in special situations *)

n: nat
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧

  
n: nat
h: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ S n ⟧

  
n: nat
h: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 h < S n

  exact (natlthtolths _ _ (pr2 h)).
Defined.


n: nat
dni lastelement = dni_lastelement


n: nat
dni lastelement = dni_lastelement

  
n: nat
dni lastelement = dni_lastelement

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
dni lastelement i = dni_lastelement i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1 (dni lastelement i) = pr1 (dni_lastelement i)

  exact (compute_pr1_dni_last n i).
Defined.


n: nat
∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧,

  match natlthorgeh j n with

  | inr _ => S j
  end = true

n, j: nat

M: j ≥ n

M: j ≥ n

n: nat

n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
dni i x = di i x

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
di i x,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (x < i) ⨿ (x ≥ i),
   match c with
   | inl _ => x
   | inr _ => S x
   end < S n) (λ _ : x < i, natgthtogths n x (pr2 x))
  (λ _ : x ≥ i, pr2 x) (natlthorgeh x i) = di i x
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (x < i) ⨿ (x ≥ i),
   match c with
   | inl _ => x
   | inr _ => S x
   end < S n) (λ _ : x < i, natgthtogths n x (pr2 x))
  (λ _ : x ≥ i, pr2 x) (natlthorgeh x i) =
match natlthorgeh x i with
| inl _ => x
| inr _ => S x
end

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
h: x < i
x,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (x < i) ⨿ (x ≥ i),
   match c with
   | inl _ => x
   | inr _ => S x
   end < S n) (λ _ : x < i, natgthtogths n x (pr2 x))
  (λ _ : x ≥ i, pr2 x) (inl h) = x
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
h: x ≥ i
S x,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (x < i) ⨿ (x ≥ i),
   match c with
   | inl _ => x
   | inr _ => S x
   end < S n) (λ _ : x < i, natgthtogths n x (pr2 x))
  (λ _ : x ≥ i, pr2 x) (inr h) = S x

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
h: x < i
x,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (x < i) ⨿ (x ≥ i),
   match c with
   | inl _ => x
   | inr _ => S x
   end < S n) (λ _ : x < i, natgthtogths n x (pr2 x))
  (λ _ : x ≥ i, pr2 x) (inl h) = x
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
h: x < i
x = x

    apply idpath.
  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
h: x ≥ i
S x,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (x < i) ⨿ (x ≥ i),
   match c with
   | inl _ => x
   | inr _ => S x
   end < S n) (λ _ : x < i, natgthtogths n x (pr2 x))
  (λ _ : x ≥ i, pr2 x) (inr h) = S x
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
h: x ≥ i
S x = S x

    apply idpath.
Defined.

(** ** The order-preserving functions [ sni n i : stn (S n) -> stn n ] that take the value [i] twice. *)


n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧

i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧

i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧

i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
si i j < n

j: ⟦ S n ⟧
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl _ => j - 1
| inr _ => j
end < n

i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
lt: i < j
j - 1 < n

(j,, J) - 1 < n

j: nat

J: 0 < S n

natgtb n (0 - 1) = true

j: nat
J: S j < S n

 contradicts (negnatlthn0 i) lt.
    
n, i: nat
I: i < n
j: nat
J: S j < S n
lt: i,, I < S j,, J

n, i: nat

j: nat

S j - 1 < n

j: nat

1 + j - 1 < n

j: nat
J: S j < S n
lt: i,, I < S j,, J
j + 1 - 1 < n

      
n, i: nat
I: i < n
j: nat
J: S j < S n
lt: i,, I < S j,, J
j < n

      exact J.
  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
ge: i ≥ j
j < n
 
n, i: nat
I: i < n
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
ge: i,, I ≥ j
j < n

    exact (natlehlthtrans _ _ _ ge I).
Defined.

(** ** Weak equivalences between standard finite sets and constructions on these sets *)



(** *** The weak equivalence from [ stn n ] to the complement of a point [ j ] in [ stn ( S n ) ] defined by [ dni j ] *)

Definition stn_compl {n : nat} (i: ⟦n⟧ ) := compl_ne _ i (stnneq i).


n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ → stn_compl i


n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ → stn_compl i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
j: ⟦ n ⟧
stn_compl i

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
j: ⟦ n ⟧
i ≠ dni i j

  apply dni_neq_i.
Defined.


n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
isweq (dnitocompl n i)


n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
isweq (dnitocompl n i)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
jni: stn_compl i
iscontr (hfiber (dnitocompl n i) jni)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
jni: stn_compl i
w: hfiber (dnitocompl n i) jni
≃ hfiber
    (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i)
     ∘ dnitocompl n i)
    (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i) jni)
iscontr (hfiber (dnitocompl n i) jni)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
jni: stn_compl i
w: hfiber (dnitocompl n i) jni
≃ hfiber
    (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i)
     ∘ dnitocompl n i)
    (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i) jni)
iscontr
  (hfiber
     (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i)
      ∘ dnitocompl n i)
     (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i) jni))

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
jni: stn_compl i
w: hfiber (dnitocompl n i) jni
≃ hfiber
    (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i)
     ∘ dnitocompl n i)
    (pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i) jni)
i ≠ pr1compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) i (stnneq i) jni

  exact (pr2 jni).
Defined.

i: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ ≃ stn_compl i

j < n <-> pr1 (weqdicompl i j) < S n

    
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
w:= weqdicompl i: nat ≃ nat_compl i
j: nat

I: i < n

j: ⟦ S n ⟧
i: unit

Defined.

n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, P i)
≃ (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, P (dni lastelement j)) ⨿ P lastelement


n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, P i)
≃ (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, P (dni lastelement j)) ⨿ P lastelement

  
n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, P i)
≃ (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, P (dni lastelement j)) ⨿ P lastelement

  
n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl x)))
⨿ (∑ y : unit, P (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inr y)))
≃ (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, P (dni lastelement j)) ⨿ P lastelement

  
n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl x)))
≃ (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, P (dni lastelement j))
n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ y : unit, P (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inr y)))
≃ P lastelement

  
n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inl x)))
≃ (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, P (dni lastelement j))
 apply idweq.
  
n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
(∑ y : unit, P (weqdnicoprod n lastelement (inr y)))
≃ P lastelement
 apply weqtotal2overunit.
Defined.


n: nat
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
j: ⟦ n ⟧
p: (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, P (dni lastelement j)) j
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inl (j,, p)) =
dni lastelement j,, p

P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
pr1: ⟦ n ⟧
pr2: P (dni lastelement pr1)

Defined.

(** *** Weak equivalences from [ stn n ] for [ n = 0 , 1 , 2 ] to [ empty ] , [ unit ] and [ bool ] ( see also the section on [ nelstruct ] in finitesets.v ). *)

¬ (⟦ 0 ⟧)

  
x: ⟦ 0 ⟧
∅

  
a: nat
b: a < 0
∅

  apply ( negnatlthn0 _ b ).
Defined.


⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ∅


⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ∅

  
⟦ 0 ⟧ → ∅

Defined.

f:= λ _ : ⟦ 1 ⟧, tt: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → unit

iscontr (⟦ 1 ⟧)

t = lastelement

t: nat
l: t < 1
t,, l = lastelement

t: nat
l: t < 1
e:= natlth1tois0 t l: t = 0
t,, l = lastelement

iscontr unit
 apply iscontrunit.
Defined.

f: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → X
is: isaset X
isincl f

∏ x x' : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f x = f x' → x = x'

is: isaset X
x, x': ⟦ 1 ⟧
e: f x = f x'
x = x'

Defined.


⟦ 2 ⟧ ≃ bool


⟦ 2 ⟧ ≃ bool

  
f:= λ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
match isdeceqnat j 0 with
| inl _ => false
| inr _ => true
end: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → bool
⟦ 2 ⟧ ≃ bool

  
f:= λ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
match isdeceqnat j 0 with
| inl _ => false
| inr _ => true
end: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → bool
g:= λ b : bool,
match b with
| true => make_stn 2 1 (idpath true)
| false => make_stn 2 0 (idpath true)
end: bool → ⟦ 2 ⟧
⟦ 2 ⟧ ≃ bool

  
f:= λ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
match isdeceqnat j 0 with
| inl _ => false
| inr _ => true
end: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → bool
g:= λ b : bool,
match b with
| true => make_stn 2 1 (idpath true)
| false => make_stn 2 0 (idpath true)
end: bool → ⟦ 2 ⟧
isweq f

  
f:= λ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
match isdeceqnat j 0 with
| inl _ => false
| inr _ => true
end: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → bool
g:= λ b : bool,
match b with
| true => make_stn 2 1 (idpath true)
| false => make_stn 2 0 (idpath true)
end: bool → ⟦ 2 ⟧
∏ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧, g (f j) = j
f:= λ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧,
match isdeceqnat j 0 with
| inl _ => false
| inr _ => true
end: ⟦ 2 ⟧ → bool
g:= λ b : bool,
match b with
| true => make_stn 2 1 (idpath true)
| false => make_stn 2 0 (idpath true)
end: bool → ⟦ 2 ⟧
egf: ∏ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧, g (f j) = j
isweq f

| true => make_stn 2 1 (idpath true)

end: bool → ⟦ 2 ⟧

g (f j) = j

| false => make_stn 2 0 (idpath true)
end: bool → ⟦ 2 ⟧
egf: ∏ j : ⟦ 2 ⟧, g (f j) = j
efg: ∏ b : bool, f (g b) = b
isweq f

  apply ( isweq_iso _ _ egf efg ).
Defined.


n: nat
isInjectiveFunction (pr1 : stnset n → natset)


n: nat
isInjectiveFunction (pr1 : stnset n → natset)

  
n: nat
i, j: stnset n
pr1 i = pr1 j → i = j

  apply subtypePath_prop.
Defined.

(** ***  Weak equivalence between the coproduct of [ stn n ] and [ stn m ] and [ stn ( n + m ) ] *)


n, m: nat
⟦ n + m ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧


n, m: nat
⟦ n + m ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n + m ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n + m ⟧
i1: i < n
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n + m ⟧
i2: i ≥ n
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n + m ⟧
i1: i < n
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧
 exact (ii1 (make_stn n i i1)).
  
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n + m ⟧
i2: i ≥ n
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧
 exact (ii2 (make_stn m (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) i2))).
Defined.


n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n 0 i =
inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)


n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n 0 i =
inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n 0 i =
inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i < n) ⨿ (i ≥ n), ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
  (λ i1 : i < n, inl (make_stn n i i1))
  (λ i2 : i ≥ n,
   inr (make_stn 0 (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) i2)))
  (natlthorgeh i n) =
inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb n i = true)
         ⨿ (match n with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb i m
            end = true), ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
  (λ i1 : natgtb n i = true, inl (make_stn n i i1))
  (λ i2 : match n with
          | 0 => true
          | S m => natgtb i m
          end = true,
   inr (make_stn 0 (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) i2)))
  (natlthorgeh i n) =
inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
I: i < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb n i = true)
         ⨿ (match n with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb i m
            end = true), ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
  (λ i1 : natgtb n i = true, inl (make_stn n i i1))
  (λ i2 : match n with
          | 0 => true
          | S m => natgtb i m
          end = true,
   inr (make_stn 0 (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) i2)))
  (inl I) = inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
J: i ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb n i = true)
         ⨿ (match n with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb i m
            end = true), ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
  (λ i1 : natgtb n i = true, inl (make_stn n i i1))
  (λ i2 : match n with
          | 0 => true
          | S m => natgtb i m
          end = true,
   inr (make_stn 0 (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) i2)))
  (inr J) = inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
I: i < n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb n i = true)
         ⨿ (match n with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb i m
            end = true), ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
  (λ i1 : natgtb n i = true, inl (make_stn n i i1))
  (λ i2 : match n with
          | 0 => true
          | S m => natgtb i m
          end = true,
   inr (make_stn 0 (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) i2)))
  (inl I) = inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
I: i < n
inl (make_stn n i I) =
inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
I: i < n
make_stn n i I = transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
I: i < n
pr1 (make_stn n i I) =
pr1 (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
I: i < n
i = pr1 (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)

    
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
I: i < n
i = pr1 (transportf stn (idpath (n + 0)) i)
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
J: i ≥ n
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (natgtb n i = true)
         ⨿ (match n with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb i m
            end = true), ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
  (λ i1 : natgtb n i = true, inl (make_stn n i i1))
  (λ i2 : match n with
          | 0 => true
          | S m => natgtb i m
          end = true,
   inr (make_stn 0 (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) i2)))
  (inr J) = inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
J: i ≥ n
inr (make_stn 0 (i - n) (nat_split (pr2 i) J)) =
inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 n) i)
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
J: i ≥ n
∅
 
n: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
J: i ≥ n
∅

    exact (natgehtonegnatlth _ _ J (stnlt i)).
Defined.


n, m: nat
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n + m ⟧


n, m: nat
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n + m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧
⟦ n + m ⟧

i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ n + m ⟧
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
⟦ n + m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ n + m ⟧
 
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧
 assumption.
  
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
⟦ n + m ⟧
 
n, m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
⟦ m ⟧
 assumption.
Defined.


n, m: nat
∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m x) = x


n, m: nat
∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m x) = x

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m x) = x

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
            (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
            (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x < n)
         ⨿ (coprod_rect
              (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
              (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
              (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x ≥ n),
   ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧)
  (λ i1 : coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
            (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
            (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x < n,
   inl
     (make_stn n
        (coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
           (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
           (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x) i1))
  (λ i2 : coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
            (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
            (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x ≥ n,
   inr
     (make_stn m
        (coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
           (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
           (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x - n)
        (nat_split
           (pr2
              (coprod_rect
                 (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
                 (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
                 (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x)) i2)))
  (natlthorgeh
     (coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
        (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i) x) n) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧
match
  natlthorgeh
    match x with
    | inl a => stn_left n m a
    | inr b => stn_right n m b
    end n
with
| inl a =>
    inl
      (make_stn n
         match x with
         | inl a0 => stn_left n m a0
         | inr b => stn_right n m b
         end a)
| inr b =>
    inr
      (make_stn m
         (match x with
          | inl a => stn_left n m a
          | inr b0 => stn_right n m b0
          end - n)
         (nat_split
            (pr2
               match x with
               | inl a => stn_left n m a
               | inr b0 => stn_right n m b0
               end) b))
end = x

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
match natlthorgeh (stn_left n m x) n with
| inl a => inl (make_stn n (stn_left n m x) a)
| inr b =>
    inr
      (make_stn m (stn_left n m x - n)
         (nat_split (pr2 (stn_left n m x)) b))
end = inl x
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
match natlthorgeh (stn_right n m x) n with
| inl a => inl (make_stn n (stn_right n m x) a)
| inr b =>
    inr
      (make_stn m (stn_right n m x - n)
         (nat_split (pr2 (stn_right n m x)) b))
end = inr x

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
match natlthorgeh (stn_left n m x) n with
| inl a => inl (make_stn n (stn_left n m x) a)
| inr b =>
    inr
      (make_stn m (stn_left n m x - n)
         (nat_split (pr2 (stn_left n m x)) b))
end = inl x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: stn_left n m x < n
inl (make_stn n (stn_left n m x) H) = inl x
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: stn_left n m x ≥ n
inr
  (make_stn m (stn_left n m x - n)
     (nat_split (pr2 (stn_left n m x)) H)) = inl x

    
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: stn_left n m x < n
inl (make_stn n (stn_left n m x) H) = inl x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: stn_left n m x < n
make_stn n (stn_left n m x) H = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: stn_left n m x < n
pr1 (make_stn n (stn_left n m x) H) = pr1 x
 apply idpath.
    
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: stn_left n m x ≥ n
inr
  (make_stn m (stn_left n m x - n)
     (nat_split (pr2 (stn_left n m x)) H)) = inl x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: stn_left n m x ≥ n
∅
 apply (natlthtonegnatgeh x n (stnlt x) H).
  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
match natlthorgeh (stn_right n m x) n with
| inl a => inl (make_stn n (stn_right n m x) a)
| inr b =>
    inr
      (make_stn m (stn_right n m x - n)
         (nat_split (pr2 (stn_right n m x)) b))
end = inr x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x < n
inl (make_stn n (stn_right n m x) H) = inr x
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x ≥ n
inr
  (make_stn m (stn_right n m x - n)
     (nat_split (pr2 (stn_right n m x)) H)) = inr x

    
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x < n
inl (make_stn n (stn_right n m x) H) = inr x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x < n
∅

      
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x < n
tmp:= natlehlthtrans n (n + x) n (natlehnplusnm n x) H: n < n
∅

      use (isirrefl_natneq n (natlthtoneq _ _ tmp)).
    
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x ≥ n
inr
  (make_stn m (stn_right n m x - n)
     (nat_split (pr2 (stn_right n m x)) H)) = inr x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x ≥ n
make_stn m (stn_right n m x - n)
  (nat_split (pr2 (stn_right n m x)) H) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x ≥ n
pr1
  (make_stn m (stn_right n m x - n)
     (nat_split (pr2 (stn_right n m x)) H)) = pr1 x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x ≥ n
n + pr1 x - n = pr1 x

      
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ m ⟧
H: stn_right n m x ≥ n
pr1 x + n - n = pr1 x
 apply plusminusnmm.
Qed.


n, m: nat
∏ y : ⟦ n + m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m y) = y


n, m: nat
∏ y : ⟦ n + m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m y) = y

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m x) = x

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧, ⟦ n + m ⟧)
  (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, stn_left n m i)
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, stn_right n m i)
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (x < n) ⨿ (x ≥ n), ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧)
     (λ i1 : x < n, inl (make_stn n x i1))
     (λ i2 : x ≥ n,
      inr (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) i2)))
     (natlthorgeh x n)) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
match
  match natlthorgeh x n with
  | inl a => inl (make_stn n x a)
  | inr b =>
      inr (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) b))
  end
with
| inl a => stn_left n m a
| inr b => stn_right n m b
end = x

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x < n
stn_left n m (make_stn n x H) = x
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
stn_right n m
  (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) H)) = x

  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x < n
stn_left n m (make_stn n x H) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x < n
pr1 (stn_left n m (make_stn n x H)) = pr1 x
 apply idpath.
  
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
stn_right n m
  (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) H)) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 = m
stn_right n m
  (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) H)) = x
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 < m
stn_right n m
  (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) H)) = x

    
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 = m
stn_right n m
  (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) H)) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 = m
∅
 
n: nat
x: ⟦ n + 0 ⟧
H: x ≥ n
∅
 
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧
H: x ≥ n
∅

      use (natlthtonegnatgeh x n (stnlt x) H).
    
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 < m
stn_right n m
  (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) H)) = x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 < m
pr1
  (stn_right n m
     (make_stn m (x - n) (nat_split (pr2 x) H))) =
pr1 x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 < m
n + (x - n) = pr1 x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 < m
x - n + n = pr1 x
 
n, m: nat
x: ⟦ n + m ⟧
H: x ≥ n
H1: 0 < m
pr1 x ≥ n
 apply H.
Qed.

(** A proof of weqfromcoprodofstn using isweq_iso *)

n, m: nat
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n + m ⟧


n, m: nat
⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n + m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
(λ f : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n + m ⟧, isweq f)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m)

  
n, m: nat
∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m x) = x
n, m: nat
∏ y : ⟦ n + m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m y) = y

  
n, m: nat
∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m x) = x
 exact (weqfromcoprodofstn_eq1 n m).
  
n, m: nat
∏ y : ⟦ n + m ⟧,
weqfromcoprodofstn_map n m
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap n m y) = y
 exact (weqfromcoprodofstn_eq2 n m).
Defined.

(** Associativity of [weqfromcoprodofstn] *)


m, n: nat
e: m = n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (eqweqmap (maponpaths stn e) i) = pr1 i


m, n: nat
e: m = n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (eqweqmap (maponpaths stn e) i) = pr1 i

  
m, n: nat
e: m = n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (eqweqmap (maponpaths stn e) i) = pr1 i

  
m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (idpath m)) i) = pr1 i

  apply idpath.
Defined.


l, m, n: nat
(eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (natplusassoc l m n))
 ∘ weqfromcoprodofstn (l + m) n
 ∘ weqcoprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn l m) (idweq (⟦ n ⟧)))%weq ~
(weqfromcoprodofstn l (m + n)
 ∘ weqcoprodf (idweq (⟦ l ⟧)) (weqfromcoprodofstn m n)
 ∘ weqcoprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧))%weq


l, m, n: nat
(eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (natplusassoc l m n))
 ∘ weqfromcoprodofstn (l + m) n
 ∘ weqcoprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn l m) (idweq (⟦ n ⟧)))%weq ~
(weqfromcoprodofstn l (m + n)
 ∘ weqcoprodf (idweq (⟦ l ⟧)) (weqfromcoprodofstn m n)
 ∘ weqcoprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧))%weq

  
l, m, n: nat
(eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (natplusassoc l m n))
 ∘ weqfromcoprodofstn (l + m) n
 ∘ weqcoprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn l m) (idweq (⟦ n ⟧)))%weq ~
(weqfromcoprodofstn l (m + n)
 ∘ weqcoprodf (idweq (⟦ l ⟧)) (weqfromcoprodofstn m n)
 ∘ weqcoprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧))%weq

  
l, m, n: nat
abc: ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧
(eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (natplusassoc l m n))
 ∘ weqfromcoprodofstn (l + m) n
 ∘ weqcoprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn l m) (idweq (⟦ n ⟧)))%weq
  abc =
(weqfromcoprodofstn l (m + n)
 ∘ weqcoprodf (idweq (⟦ l ⟧)) (weqfromcoprodofstn m n)
 ∘ weqcoprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧))%weq abc

  
l, m, n: nat
abc: ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧
eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (natplusassoc l m n))
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) abc)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
  (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
     (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) abc))

  
l, m, n: nat
abc: ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧
isincl pr1
l, m, n: nat
abc: ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧
pr1
  (eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (natplusassoc l m n))
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
        (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
           (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) abc))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) abc)))
 
l, m, n: nat
abc: ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧
pr1
  (eqweqmap (maponpaths stn (natplusassoc l m n))
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
        (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
           (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) abc))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) abc)))

  
l, m, n: nat
abc: ⟦ l ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) abc)) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) abc)))

  
l, m, n: nat
a: ⟦ l ⟧
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) (inl (inl a)))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧)
           (inl (inl a)))))
l, m, n: nat
b: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) (inl (inr b)))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧)
           (inl (inr b)))))
l, m, n: nat
c: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) (inr c))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) (inr c))))

  
l, m, n: nat
a: ⟦ l ⟧
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) (inl (inl a)))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧)
           (inl (inl a)))))
 
l, m, n: nat
a: ⟦ l ⟧
pr1 a = pr1 a
 apply idpath.
  
l, m, n: nat
b: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) (inl (inr b)))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧)
           (inl (inr b)))))
 
l, m, n: nat
b: ⟦ m ⟧
l + pr1 b = l + pr1 b
 apply idpath.
  
l, m, n: nat
c: ⟦ n ⟧
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (l + m) n
     (coprodf (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l m)
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, x) (inr c))) =
pr1
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map l (m + n)
     (coprodf (λ x : ⟦ l ⟧, x)
        (weqfromcoprodofstn_map m n)
        (coprodasstor (⟦ l ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) (inr c))))
 
l, m, n: nat
c: ⟦ n ⟧
l + m + pr1 c = l + (m + pr1 c)
 apply natplusassoc.
Defined.

(** *** Weak equivalence from the total space of a family [ stn ( f x ) ]  over [ stn n ] to [ stn ( stnsum n f ) ] *)


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
nat


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
nat

  
n: nat
(⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat

  
(⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) → nat
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat
(⟦ S n ⟧ → nat) → nat

  
(⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) → nat
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
nat
 exact 0.
  
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat
(⟦ S n ⟧ → nat) → nat
 
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
nat
 exact (IHn (λ i, f (dni lastelement i)) + f lastelement).
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g


n: nat
f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g

  
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
stnsum f = stnsum g

  
f, g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
stnsum f = stnsum g
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat, f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g
stnsum f = stnsum g

  
f, g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
stnsum f = stnsum g
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat, f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g
stnsum f = stnsum g
 
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat, f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement =
stnsum (g ∘ dni lastelement) + g lastelement

    
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat, f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement =
stnsum (g ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement

    
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat, f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) =
stnsum (g ∘ dni lastelement)

    
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat, f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g
f ∘ dni lastelement ~ g ∘ dni lastelement

    
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat, f ~ g → stnsum f = stnsum g
x: ⟦ n ⟧
(f ∘ dni lastelement) x = (g ∘ dni lastelement) x

    apply h.
Defined.


m, n: nat
e: m = n
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
stnsum g =
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, g (transportf stn e i))


m, n: nat
e: m = n
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
stnsum g =
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, g (transportf stn e i))

  
m, n: nat
e: m = n
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
stnsum g =
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, g (transportf stn e i))

  
m: nat
g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
stnsum g =
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, g (transportf stn (idpath m) i))

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g


n: nat
f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g

  
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
stnsum f ≤ stnsum g

  
f, g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, f i ≤ g i
stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
stnsum f ≤ stnsum g

  
f, g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, f i ≤ g i
stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
 
f, g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, f i ≤ g i
true = true
 apply idpath.
  
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
 
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
(fix F (n : nat) : (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat :=
   match n as n0 return ((⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat) → nat) with
   | 0 => λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat, 0
   | S n0 =>
       λ f : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat,
       F n0 (λ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) +
       f lastelement
   end) n (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
≤ (fix F (n : nat) : (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat :=
     match n as n0 return ((⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat) → nat) with
     | 0 => λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat, 0
     | S n0 =>
         λ f : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat,
         F n0 (λ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) +
         f lastelement
     end) n (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, g (dni lastelement i))
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
f lastelement ≤ g lastelement

    
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
(fix F (n : nat) : (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat :=
   match n as n0 return ((⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat) → nat) with
   | 0 => λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat, 0
   | S n0 =>
       λ f : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat,
       F n0 (λ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) +
       f lastelement
   end) n (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
≤ (fix F (n : nat) : (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat :=
     match n as n0 return ((⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat) → nat) with
     | 0 => λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat, 0
     | S n0 =>
         λ f : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat,
         F n0 (λ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) +
         f lastelement
     end) n (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, g (dni lastelement i))
 
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧,
f (dni lastelement i) ≤ g (dni lastelement i)
 
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
i: ⟦ n ⟧
f (dni lastelement i) ≤ g (dni lastelement i)
 apply le.
    
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
le: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, f i ≤ g i
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i ≤ g i) → stnsum f ≤ stnsum g
f lastelement ≤ g lastelement
 apply le.
Defined.


m, n: nat
e: m = n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
transportf stn e i =
make_stn n (pr1 i)
  (transportf (λ k : nat, pr1 i < k) e (pr2 i))


m, n: nat
e: m = n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
transportf stn e i =
make_stn n (pr1 i)
  (transportf (λ k : nat, pr1 i < k) e (pr2 i))

  
m, n: nat
e: m = n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
transportf stn e i =
make_stn n (pr1 i)
  (transportf (λ k : nat, pr1 i < k) e (pr2 i))

  
m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
transportf stn (idpath m) i =
make_stn m (pr1 i)
  (transportf (λ k : nat, pr1 i < k) (idpath m)
     (pr2 i))

  
m: nat
i: ⟦ m ⟧
pr1 (transportf stn (idpath m) i) =
pr1
  (make_stn m (pr1 i)
     (transportf (λ k : nat, pr1 i < k) (idpath m)
        (pr2 i)))

  apply idpath.
Defined.


m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)


m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)

  (* why is this proof so obnoxious and fragile? *)
  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
 
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m 0) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m 0)
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n))

  
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m 0) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m 0)
 
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m 0) + 0
 
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m 0)

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
e: m = m + 0
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m 0)

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
e: m = m + 0
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f (transportf stn e i)) =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m 0)
 
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
e: m = m + 0
i: ⟦ m ⟧
f (transportf stn e i) = (f ∘ stn_left m 0) i
 
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
e: m = m + 0
i: ⟦ m ⟧
f (transportf stn e i) = f (stn_left m 0 i)

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
e: m = m + 0
i: ⟦ m ⟧
transportf stn e i = stn_left m 0 i
 
m: nat
f: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧ → nat
e: m = m + 0
i: ⟦ m ⟧
stn_left m 0 i = transportf stn e i
 apply stn_left_0. 
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n))

  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
(stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n) ∘ dni lastelement) +
 (f ∘ stn_right m (S n)) lastelement)

f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
S (m + n) = m + S n

f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
(stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n) ∘ dni lastelement) +

f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
m + S n = S (m + n)

m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum f =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
(stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n) ∘ dni lastelement) +
 (f ∘ stn_right m (S n)) lastelement)

  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i)) =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
(stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n) ∘ dni lastelement) +
 (f ∘ stn_right m (S n)) lastelement)

  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) +
f (transportf stn e lastelement) =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
(stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n) ∘ dni lastelement) +
 (f ∘ stn_right m (S n)) lastelement)

stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)

stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) +
f (transportf stn e lastelement) =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n) ∘ dni lastelement) +
(f ∘ stn_right m (S n)) lastelement

stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)

m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
   ∘ dni lastelement ∘ stn_left m n) +
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
   ∘ dni lastelement ∘ stn_right m n) =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) +
stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m (S n) ∘ dni lastelement)

f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
   ∘ dni lastelement ∘ stn_left m n) =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n))
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
   ∘ dni lastelement ∘ stn_right m n) =

f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
   ∘ dni lastelement ∘ stn_left m n) =
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m (S n))
 
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
((λ i : ⟦ S (m + n) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
 ∘ dni lastelement ∘ stn_left m n) i =
(f ∘ stn_left m (S n)) i

f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
i: ⟦ m ⟧
f
  (transportf stn e (dni lastelement (stn_left m n i))) =
f (stn_left m (S n) i)

e: S (m + n) = m + S n

m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + S n ⟧ → nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
e: S (m + n) = m + S n
f (transportf stn e lastelement) =
(f ∘ stn_right m (S n)) lastelement

f (transportf stn e lastelement) =
f (stn_right m (S n) lastelement)

IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat,
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) + stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)
pr1 (transportf stn (idpath (S (m + n))) lastelement) =
pr1 (stn_right m (S n) lastelement)
 apply idpath.
Defined.


m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) ≤ stnsum f


m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m + n ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n)
≤ stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m n) +
  stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m n)

  apply natlehnplusnm.
Defined.


m, n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
r: m ≤ n
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m n r) ≤ stnsum f


m, n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
r: m ≤ n
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m n r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
r: m ≤ n
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m n r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
r: m ≤ n
s: n - m + m = n
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m n r) ≤ stnsum f
 
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
r: m ≤ n
s: m + (n - m) = n
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m n r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n: nat
s: m + (n - m) = n
∏ (r : m ≤ n) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m n r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n: nat
∏ (r : m ≤ m + (n - m)) (f : ⟦ m + (n - m) ⟧ → nat),
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m (m + (n - m)) r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n: nat
k:= n - m: nat
∏ (r : m ≤ m + k) (f : ⟦ m + k ⟧ → nat),
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m (m + k) r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n, k: nat
r: m ≤ m + k
f: ⟦ m + k ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m (m + k) r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n, k: nat
r: m ≤ m + k
f: ⟦ m + k ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left' m (m + k) r) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n, k: nat
r: m ≤ m + k
f: ⟦ m + k ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m k) ≤ stnsum f

  
m, n, k: nat
r: m ≤ m + k
f: ⟦ m + k ⟧ → nat
stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m k)
≤ stnsum (f ∘ stn_left m k) +
  stnsum (f ∘ stn_right m k)

  apply natlehnplusnm.
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ dni j) + f j


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ dni j) + f j

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ S n ⟧
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ dni j) + f j

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ dni (j,, J)) + f (j,, J)

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
j + (n - j) = n

j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ dni (j,, J)) + f (j,, J)

 exact J.

 exact e2. 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum f = stnsum (f ∘ dni (j,, J)) + f (j,, J)

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum f =
stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i)) =
stnsum (f ∘ dni (j,, J)) + f (j,, J)

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum f =
stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i))
 apply (transport_stnsum e).
  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧, f (transportf stn e i)) =
stnsum (f ∘ dni (j,, J)) + f (j,, J)
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ S j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_left (S j) (n - j) x))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) =
stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni (j,, J) x)) + f (j,, J)

    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni (j,, J) x)) + f (j,, J) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ S j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_left (S j) (n - j) x))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ j + (n - j) ⟧,
   f (dni (j,, J) (transportf stn e2 i))) + f (j,, J) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ S j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_left (S j) (n - j) x))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x)))

    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x)))) +
f (j,, J) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ S j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_left (S j) (n - j) x))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x)))

    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x)))) +
f (j,, J) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) +
f
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement)) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x)))

    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) +
f
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement)) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x)))) +
f (j,, J)

    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) +
(f
   (transportf stn e
      (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement)) +
 stnsum
   (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
    f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x)))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x)))) +
f (j,, J)
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) +
(stnsum
   (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
    f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) +
 f
   (transportf stn e
      (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x)))) +
f (j,, J)

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n

e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,

stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) +
f
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x)))) +
f (j,, J)

    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,

stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,

n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
f
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement)) = f (j,, J)

    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x)))) +
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x))))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x))))
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x))))

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (transportf stn e
        (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement x)))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) x))))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: ⟦ j ⟧
f
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement i))) =
f
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) i)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < j
f
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement (i,, I)))) =
f
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < j
transportf stn e
  (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement (i,, I))) =
dni (j,, J)
  (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < j
pr1
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement (i,, I)))) =
pr1
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))

        
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I: i < j
pr1
  (transportf stn (idpath (S j + (n - j)))
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement (i,, I)))) =
pr1
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
 
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I: i < j
pr1 (stn_left (S j) (n - j) (dni lastelement (i,, I))) =
pr1
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
 
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I: i < j
dni lastelement (i,, I) =
pr1
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))

        
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I: i < j
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl _ => i
| inr _ => S i
end =
match
  natlthorgeh
    (pr1
       (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
    j
with
| inl _ =>
    pr1
      (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I)))
| inr _ =>
    S
      (pr1
         (transportf stn e2
            (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
end

        
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I, R: i < j
i =
match
  natlthorgeh
    (pr1
       (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
    j
with
| inl _ =>
    pr1
      (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I)))
| inr _ =>
    S
      (pr1
         (transportf stn e2
            (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
end
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I: i < j
R: i ≥ j
S i =
match
  natlthorgeh
    (pr1
       (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
    j
with
| inl _ =>
    pr1
      (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I)))
| inr _ =>
    S
      (pr1
         (transportf stn e2
            (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
end

        
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I, R: i < j
i =
match
  natlthorgeh
    (pr1
       (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
    j
with
| inl _ =>
    pr1
      (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I)))
| inr _ =>
    S
      (pr1
         (transportf stn e2
            (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
end
 
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I, R: i < j
i =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl _ => i
| inr _ => S i
end

J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I, R, a: i < j
i = i

J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n

I, R: i < j
b: i ≥ j

f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I, R, a: i < j

n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I, R: i < j
b: i ≥ j
i = S i
 contradicts R (natlehneggth b).
        
n, j: nat
J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I: i < j
R: i ≥ j
S i =
match
  natlthorgeh
    (pr1
       (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
    j
with
| inl _ =>
    pr1
      (transportf stn e2 (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I)))
| inr _ =>
    S
      (pr1
         (transportf stn e2
            (stn_left j (n - j) (i,, I))))
end

J: j < S n
f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n
i: nat
I: i < j
R: i ≥ j
S i =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl _ => i
| inr _ => S i
end

V: i < j
S i = i

e2: j + (n - j) = n

 contradicts I (natlehneggth R).
           
n, j: nat

f: ⟦ S j + (n - j) ⟧ → nat
e2: j + (n - j) = n

R, V: i ≥ j
S i = S i
 apply idpath.
      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) x))) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ n - j ⟧,
   f
     (dni (j,, J)
        (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) x))))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: ⟦ n - j ⟧
f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) i)) =
f
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) i)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
f (transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) (i,, I))) =
f
  (dni (j,, J)
     (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) (i,, I))))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
transportf stn e (stn_right (S j) (n - j) (i,, I)) =
dni (j,, J)
  (transportf stn e2 (stn_right j (n - j) (i,, I)))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
make_stn (S n) (S (j + i))
  (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (S (j + i)) = true)
     e (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) =
match natlthorgeh (j + i) j with
| inl _ => j + i
| inr _ => S (j + i)
end,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (natgtb j (j + i) = true)
         ⨿ (match j with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
            end = true),
   match
     match c with
     | inl _ => j + i
     | inr _ => S (j + i)
     end
   with
   | 0 => true
   | S m => natgtb n m
   end = true)
  (λ _ : natgtb j (j + i) = true,
   natgthtogths n (j + i)
     (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true)
        e2 (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)))
  (λ _ : match j with
         | 0 => true
         | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
         end = true,
   transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true) e2
     (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I))
  (natlthorgeh (j + i) j)

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
X: j + i < j
make_stn (S n) (S (j + i))
  (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (S (j + i)) = true)
     e (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) =
j + i,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (natgtb j (j + i) = true)
         ⨿ (match j with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
            end = true),
   match
     match c with
     | inl _ => j + i
     | inr _ => S (j + i)
     end
   with
   | 0 => true
   | S m => natgtb n m
   end = true)
  (λ _ : natgtb j (j + i) = true,
   natgthtogths n (j + i)
     (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true)
        e2 (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)))
  (λ _ : match j with
         | 0 => true
         | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
         end = true,
   transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true) e2
     (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) (inl X)

J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n

X: j + i ≥ j
make_stn (S n) (S (j + i))
  (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (S (j + i)) = true)
     e (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) =
S (j + i),,

   transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true) e2
     (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) (inr X)

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
X: j + i < j
make_stn (S n) (S (j + i))
  (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (S (j + i)) = true)
     e (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) =
j + i,,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (natgtb j (j + i) = true)
         ⨿ (match j with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
            end = true),
   match
     match c with
     | inl _ => j + i
     | inr _ => S (j + i)
     end
   with
   | 0 => true
   | S m => natgtb n m
   end = true)
  (λ _ : natgtb j (j + i) = true,
   natgthtogths n (j + i)
     (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true)
        e2 (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)))
  (λ _ : match j with
         | 0 => true
         | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
         end = true,
   transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true) e2
     (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) (inl X)
 contradicts (negnatlthplusnmn j i) X.
        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
X: j + i ≥ j
make_stn (S n) (S (j + i))
  (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (S (j + i)) = true)
     e (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) =
S (j + i),,
coprod_rect
  (λ c : (natgtb j (j + i) = true)
         ⨿ (match j with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
            end = true),
   match
     match c with
     | inl _ => j + i
     | inr _ => S (j + i)
     end
   with
   | 0 => true
   | S m => natgtb n m
   end = true)
  (λ _ : natgtb j (j + i) = true,
   natgthtogths n (j + i)
     (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true)
        e2 (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)))
  (λ _ : match j with
         | 0 => true
         | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
         end = true,
   transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true) e2
     (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) (inr X)
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
X: j + i ≥ j
pr1
  (make_stn (S n) (S (j + i))
     (transportf
        (λ k : nat, natgtb k (S (j + i)) = true) e
        (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I))) =
pr1
  (S (j + i),,
   coprod_rect
     (λ c : (natgtb j (j + i) = true)
            ⨿ (match j with
               | 0 => true
               | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
               end = true),
      match
        match c with
        | inl _ => j + i
        | inr _ => S (j + i)
        end
      with
      | 0 => true
      | S m => natgtb n m
      end = true)
     (λ _ : natgtb j (j + i) = true,
      natgthtogths n (j + i)
        (transportf
           (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true) e2
           (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)))
     (λ _ : match j with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb (j + i) m
            end = true,
      transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k (j + i) = true)
        e2 (natlthandplusl i (n - j) j I)) (inr X))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
i: nat
I: i < n - j
X: j + i ≥ j
S (j + i) = S (j + i)
 apply idpath.
    
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
f
  (transportf stn e
     (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement)) = f (j,, J)
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
transportf stn e (stn_left (S j) (n - j) lastelement) =
j,, J

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
make_stn (S n) j
  (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k j = true) e
     (natlthlehtrans j (S j) (S (j + (n - j)))
        (natgthsnn j) (natlehnplusnm (S j) (n - j)))) =
j,, J

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: nat
J: j < S n
e2: j + (n - j) = n
e: S j + (n - j) = S n
pr1
  (make_stn (S n) j
     (transportf (λ k : nat, natgtb k j = true) e
        (natlthlehtrans j (S j) (S (j + (n - j)))
           (natgthsnn j) (natlehnplusnm (S j) (n - j))))) =
pr1 (j,, J)

      apply idpath.
Defined.

n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
m: 0 < n
l: 1 ≤ n
e: n = S (n - 1)
f j
≤ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ S (n - 1) ⟧, f (transportf stn (! e) i))

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
m: 0 < n
l: 1 ≤ n
e: n = S (n - 1)
f j
≤ stnsum
    ((λ i : ⟦ S (n - 1) ⟧, f (transportf stn (! e) i))
     ∘ dni (transportf stn e j)) +
  f (transportf stn (! e) (transportf stn e j))

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
m: 0 < n
l: 1 ≤ n
e: n = S (n - 1)
f j
≤ stnsum
    (λ x : ⟦ n - 1 ⟧,
     f
       (transportf stn (! e)
          (dni (transportf stn e j) x))) +
  f (transportf stn (! e) (transportf stn e j))

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
m: 0 < n
l: 1 ≤ n
e: n = S (n - 1)
s: nat
f j
≤ s + f (transportf stn (! e) (transportf stn e j))

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
m: 0 < n
l: 1 ≤ n
s: nat
f j
≤ s +
  f
    (transportf stn (! idpath n)
       (transportf stn (idpath n) j))
 apply natlehmplusnm.
Defined.

Defined.

stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧, 1) = 0

IH: stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) = n
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, 1) = S n

  
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧, 1) = 0
 apply idpath. 
n: nat
IH: stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) = n
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, 1) = S n

IH: stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) = n
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) + 1 = S n

IH: stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) = n
1 + stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) = S n

  
n: nat
IH: stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) = n
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ n ⟧, 1) = n

  exact IH.
Defined.


m, c: nat
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧, c) = m * c


m, c: nat
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧, c) = m * c

  
m, c: nat
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧, c) = m * c

  
c: nat
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧, c) = 0 * c
m, c: nat
I: stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧, c) = m * c
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ S m ⟧, c) = S m * c

  
c: nat
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ 0 ⟧, c) = 0 * c
 apply idpath.
  
m, c: nat
I: stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧, c) = m * c
stnsum (λ _ : ⟦ S m ⟧, c) = S m * c
 exact (maponpaths (λ i, i+c) I).
Defined.

≤ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)
f firstelement

 exact (lastelement,,k).

n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)) ⟧
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inl j)) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
  (weqstnsum_invmap (f ∘ dni lastelement) j)

weqstnsum_invmap f

n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)) ⟧
nat_rect
  (λ n : nat,
   ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
   ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
  (λ (m : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
   fromempty (negstn0 l))
  (λ (n : nat)
   (IH : ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
         ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
   (m : ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
            ⨿ ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
      ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
     (λ j : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧,
      total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
        (IH (m ∘ dni lastelement) j))
     (λ k : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧, lastelement,, k)
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
        (stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement)) (m lastelement)
        l)) (S n) f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inl j)) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
  (weqstnsum_invmap (f ∘ dni lastelement) j)
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)) ⟧
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
         ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
  (λ j : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧,
   total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
     ((fix F (n : nat) :
           ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
           ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧ :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (∏ m : ⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat,
              ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
         with
         | 0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             fromempty (negstn0 l)
         | S n0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat)
             (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             coprod_rect
               (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
                      ⨿ ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                ∑ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
               (λ j0 : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement)
                       ⟧,
                total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
                  (F n0 (m ∘ dni lastelement) j0))
               (λ k : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                lastelement,, k)
               (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
                  (stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement))
                  (m lastelement) l)
         end) n (f ∘ dni lastelement) j))
  (λ k : ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, lastelement,, k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
     (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)) (f lastelement)
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
        (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
        (f lastelement) (inl j))) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
  (weqstnsum_invmap (f ∘ dni lastelement) j)

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)) ⟧
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
         ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
  (λ j : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧,
   total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
     ((fix F (n : nat) :
           ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
           ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧ :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (∏ m : ⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat,
              ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
         with
         | 0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             fromempty (negstn0 l)
         | S n0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat)
             (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             coprod_rect
               (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
                      ⨿ ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                ∑ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
               (λ j0 : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement)
                       ⟧,
                total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
                  (F n0 (m ∘ dni lastelement) j0))
               (λ k : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                lastelement,, k)
               (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
                  (stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement))
                  (m lastelement) l)
         end) n (f ∘ dni lastelement) j))
  (λ k : ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, lastelement,, k) (inl j) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
  (weqstnsum_invmap (f ∘ dni lastelement) j)
 apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr k)) = lastelement,, k


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr k)) = lastelement,, k

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr k)) = lastelement,, k
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
nat_rect
  (λ n : nat,
   ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
   ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
  (λ (m : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
   fromempty (negstn0 l))
  (λ (n : nat)
   (IH : ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
         ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
   (m : ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
   coprod_rect
     (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
            ⨿ ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
      ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
     (λ j : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧,
      total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
        (IH (m ∘ dni lastelement) j))
     (λ k : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧, lastelement,, k)
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
        (stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement)) (m lastelement)
        l)) (S n) f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr k)) = lastelement,, k
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
         ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
  (λ j : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧,
   total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
     ((fix F (n : nat) :
           ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
           ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧ :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (∏ m : ⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat,
              ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
         with
         | 0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             fromempty (negstn0 l)
         | S n0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat)
             (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             coprod_rect
               (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
                      ⨿ ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                ∑ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
               (λ j0 : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement)
                       ⟧,
                total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
                  (F n0 (m ∘ dni lastelement) j0))
               (λ k : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                lastelement,, k)
               (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
                  (stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement))
                  (m lastelement) l)
         end) n (f ∘ dni lastelement) j))
  (λ k : ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, lastelement,, k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
     (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)) (f lastelement)
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
        (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
        (f lastelement) (inr k))) = lastelement,, k

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
         ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
  (λ j : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧,
   total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
     ((fix F (n : nat) :
           ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
           ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧ :=
         match
           n as n0
           return
             (∏ m : ⟦ n0 ⟧ → nat,
              ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → ∑ i : ⟦ n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
         with
         | 0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             fromempty (negstn0 l)
         | S n0 =>
             λ (m : ⟦ S n0 ⟧ → nat)
             (l : ⟦ stnsum m ⟧),
             coprod_rect
               (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
                      ⨿ ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                ∑ i : ⟦ S n0 ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧)
               (λ j0 : ⟦ stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement)
                       ⟧,
                total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
                  (F n0 (m ∘ dni lastelement) j0))
               (λ k : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
                lastelement,, k)
               (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap
                  (stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement))
                  (m lastelement) l)
         end) n (f ∘ dni lastelement) j))
  (λ k : ⟦ f lastelement ⟧, lastelement,, k) (inr k) =
lastelement,, k
 apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
∏ (i i' : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧) (j' : ⟦ m i' ⟧),
i < i'
→ stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j'


n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
∏ (i i' : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧) (j' : ⟦ m i' ⟧),
i < i'
→ stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j'

  
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: i < i'
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j'

  
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j'

  
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j'

m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i'))

  
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS)
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS)
≤ stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i'))

  
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧

ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS)
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j <
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS ∘ dni lastelement) +
(m ∘ stn_left'' ltS) lastelement

i, i': ⟦ n ⟧

stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) =
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS ∘ dni lastelement)

n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧

k: ⟦ i ⟧
