(m ∘ stn_left'' ltS ∘ dni lastelement) k

m (stn_left'' (stnlt i) k) =

      apply subtypePath_prop, idpath.
    
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧

j < (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS) lastelement

    apply (stnlt j).

n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
k: ⟦ S i ⟧
(m ∘ stn_left'' ltS) k =
(m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i') ∘ stn_left' (S i) i' lt) k

      
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
k: ⟦ S i ⟧
m (stn_left'' ltS k) =
m (stn_left'' (stnlt i') (stn_left' (S i) i' lt k))
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
k: ⟦ S i ⟧
stn_left'' ltS k =
stn_left'' (stnlt i') (stn_left' (S i) i' lt k)

      apply subtypePath_prop, idpath.
    
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
i, i': ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
lt: S i ≤ i'
ltS:= natlehlthtrans (S i) i' n lt (stnlt i'): S i < n
e: stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS) =
stnsum
  (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')
   ∘ stn_left' (S i) i' lt)
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' ltS)
≤ stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i'))

stnsum
  (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')
   ∘ stn_left' (S i) i' lt)
stnsum
  (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i') ∘ stn_left' (S i) i' lt)
≤ stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i'))

    apply stnsum_left_le'.
Defined.

      induction (natneqchoice _ _ ne);
        [apply natgthtoneq | apply natlthtoneq];
        apply partial_sum_prop_aux;
        assumption.

transportf
  (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
   ∑ j : ⟦ m x ⟧,
   stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt x)) + j = l) p
  (pr2 (i,, j,, e)) = pr2 (i',, j',, e')

transportf
  (λ x : ⟦ m (pr1 (i',, j',, e')) ⟧,
   stnsum
     (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (pr1 (i',, j',, e')))) + x =
   l) ?p
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
         ∑ j : ⟦ m x ⟧,

  (transportf
     (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
      ∑ j : ⟦ m x ⟧,

     (idpath i) (pr2 (i,, j,, e))) =

n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
e: stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
j': ⟦ m i ⟧
e': stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j' = l
e'':= e @ ! e': stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j =
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j'
pr1 j = pr1 j'

      apply (natpluslcan _ _ _ e'').
    
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m i ⟧
e: stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
i': ⟦ n ⟧
j': ⟦ m i' ⟧
e': stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j' = l
e'':= e @ ! e': stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j =
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j'
p: i = i'
transportf
  (λ x : ⟦ m (pr1 (i',, j',, e')) ⟧,
   stnsum
     (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (pr1 (i',, j',, e')))) + x =
   l)
  (paths_rect (⟦ n ⟧) i
     (λ (i' : ⟦ n ⟧) (p : i = i'),
      ∏ (j' : ⟦ m i' ⟧)
      (e' : stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i')) + j' =
            l),
      let e'' := e @ ! e' in
      pr1
        (transportf
           (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
            ∑ j : ⟦ m x ⟧,
            stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt x)) + j = l)
           p (pr2 (i,, j,, e))) = pr12 (i',, j',, e'))
     (λ (j' : ⟦ m i ⟧)
      (e' : stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j' = l),
      let e'' := e @ ! e' in
      subtypePath_prop
        (natpluslcan j j'
           (stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i))) e'')
      :
      pr1
        (transportf
           (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
            ∑ j : ⟦ m x ⟧,
            stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt x)) + j = l)
           (idpath i) (pr2 (i,, j,, e))) =
      pr12 (i,, j',, e')) i' p j' e')
  (pr2
     (transportf
        (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
         ∑ j : ⟦ m x ⟧,
         stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt x)) + j = l) p
        (pr2 (i,, j,, e)))) = pr22 (i',, j',, e')
 apply isasetnat.
Defined.


n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
l < stnsum m
→ ∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

l: nat

→ ∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

l: nat

len:= stnsum m: nat

stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
IH: ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
l < stnsum m
→ let len := stnsum m in
  ∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

  
m: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
∃! (i : ⟦ 0 ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
 
m: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
∅
 
m: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < 0
len:= stnsum m: nat
∅
 exact (negnatlthn0 _ lt). 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
IH: ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
l < stnsum m
→ let len := stnsum m in
  ∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

  
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
IH: ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
l < stnsum m
→ let len := stnsum m in
  ∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
IH': let len := stnsum m' in
∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

    
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
ijJ: ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
    stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
t = ijJ
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
jJ: ∑ j : ⟦ m' i ⟧,
stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
    stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
t = i,, jJ
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m' i ⟧
J: stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
    stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
t = i,, j,, J
(λ cntr : ∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) 
          (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
          stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
 ∏
 t : ∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
     stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat

lt: l < stnsum m

(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m' i ⟧
J: stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
    stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
t = i,, j,, J

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat

lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m' i ⟧
J: stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
    stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
t = i,, j,, J
∑ j : ⟦ m (dni_lastelement i) ⟧,
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (dni_lastelement i))) +
j = l

m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat

I: l < len'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m' i ⟧
J: stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),

t = i,, j,, J

j = l

      abstract (use (_ @ J); apply (maponpaths (λ x, x+j)); apply stnsum_eq; intro r;
      unfold m'; simpl; apply maponpaths; apply subtypePath_prop, idpath).
    
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m' i ⟧
J: stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
    stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
t = i,, j,, J
(λ cntr : ∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) 
          (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
          stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
 ∏
 t : ∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
     stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
 t = cntr)
  (dni_lastelement i,,
   j,, partial_sum_slot_subproof n m l i j J)
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
I: l < len'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ m' i ⟧
J: stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
Q: ∏
t : ∑ (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m' i ⟧),
    stnsum (m' ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l,
t = i,, j,, J
t: ∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
t =
dni_lastelement i,,
j,, partial_sum_slot_subproof n m l i j J

      apply partial_sum_prop.
  
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
IH: ∏ m : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
l < stnsum m
→ let len := stnsum m in
  ∃! (i : ⟦ n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
  stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
∃! (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

    
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
isaprop
  (∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
   stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l)

   stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l)

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

    
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: l - len' + len' = l
∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
∑ (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (j : ⟦ m i ⟧),
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt i)) + j = l

    
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
∑ j : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt lastelement)) + j = l

    
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat

lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
⟦ m lastelement ⟧
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
(λ j : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
 stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt lastelement)) + j = l)
  ?pr1

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat

m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
len' + j < len' + m lastelement
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,

len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
j + len' < len' + m lastelement

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
len = len' + m lastelement
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) + m lastelement =
len' + m lastelement
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) + m lastelement =
stnsum (m ∘ dni_lastelement) + m lastelement

        
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
stnsum (m ∘ dni_lastelement) + m lastelement =
stnsum (m ∘ dni_lastelement) + m lastelement
 apply idpath. 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
C: len = len' + m lastelement
l < len' + m lastelement

      
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
l < len
 exact lt.
    
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
(λ j : ⟦ m lastelement ⟧,
 stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt lastelement)) + j = l)
  (j,,
   natlthandpluslinv j (m lastelement) len'
     (internal_paths_rew_r nat 
        (len' + j) (j + len')
        (λ n0 : nat, n0 < len' + m lastelement)
        (let p := ! K in
         let n0 := j + len' in
         paths_rect nat l
           (λ (n1 : nat) 
            (_ : l = n1),
            n1 = l → n1 < len' + m lastelement)
           (λ _ : l = l,
            let C :=
              stnsum_step m @
              (internal_paths_rew_r 
                 (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧) 
                 (dni lastelement) dni_lastelement
                 (λ s : ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ S n ⟧,
                  stnsum (m ∘ s) + m lastelement =
                  stnsum (m ∘ dni_lastelement) +
                  m lastelement)
                 (idpath
                    (stnsum (m ∘ dni_lastelement) +
                     m lastelement))
                 (replace_dni_last n)
               :
               stnsum (m ∘ dni lastelement) +
               m lastelement = 
               len' + m lastelement) in
            let n1 := len' + m lastelement in
            paths_rect nat len
              (λ (n2 : nat) (_ : len = n2), l < n2) lt
              n1 C) n0 p K) 
        (natpluscomm len' j)))
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (natgthsnn n)) + j = l

m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (natgthsnn n)) + j =
stnsum m' + j

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat

n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
stnsum (m ∘ stn_left'' (natgthsnn n)) = stnsum m'
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
i: ⟦ n ⟧
(m ∘ stn_left'' (natgthsnn n)) i = m' i

         
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
i: ⟦ n ⟧
(m ∘ stn_left'' (natgthsnn n)) i =
(m ∘ dni_lastelement) i
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
i: ⟦ n ⟧
m (stn_left'' (natgthsnn n) i) = m (dni_lastelement i)
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
i: ⟦ n ⟧
stn_left'' (natgthsnn n) i = dni_lastelement i

         apply subtypePath_prop, idpath.
      
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
stnsum m' + j = l
 
n: nat
m: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
l: nat
lt: l < stnsum m
len:= stnsum m: nat
m':= m ∘ dni_lastelement: ∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ _ : ⟦ S n ⟧, nat) (dni_lastelement x)
len':= stnsum m': nat
J: l ≥ len'
j:= l - len': nat
K: j + len' = l
j + stnsum m' = l
 exact K.
Defined.


n, i: nat
stn_right i (S n) firstelement =
make_stn (i + S n) i (natltplusS n i)


n, i: nat
stn_right i (S n) firstelement =
make_stn (i + S n) i (natltplusS n i)

  
n, i: nat
stn_right i (S n) firstelement =
make_stn (i + S n) i (natltplusS n i)

  
n, i: nat
pr1 (stn_right i (S n) firstelement) =
pr1 (make_stn (i + S n) i (natltplusS n i))

  
n, i: nat
i + 0 = i

  apply natplusr0.
Defined.


P: nat → UU
p0: P 0
IH: ∏ n : nat, P n → P (S n)
n: nat
nat_rect P p0 IH (S n) = IH n (nat_rect P p0 IH n)


P: nat → UU
p0: P 0
IH: ∏ n : nat, P n → P (S n)
n: nat
nat_rect P p0 IH (S n) = IH n (nat_rect P p0 IH n)

  
P: nat → UU
p0: P 0
IH: ∏ n : nat, P n → P (S n)
n: nat
nat_rect P p0 IH (S n) = IH n (nat_rect P p0 IH n)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
n: nat
∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
∏ f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat,
(∑ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
n': nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n' ⟧ → nat, (∑ i : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
∏ f : ⟦ S n' ⟧ → nat,
(∑ i : ⟦ S n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
∏ f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat,
(∑ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
¬ (∑ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
¬ (⟦ stnsum f ⟧)

    
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
¬ (∑ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
 exact (negstn0 ∘ pr1).
    
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
¬ (⟦ stnsum f ⟧)
 exact negstn0. 
n': nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n' ⟧ → nat, (∑ i : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
∏ f : ⟦ S n' ⟧ → nat,
(∑ i : ⟦ S n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
n': nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n' ⟧ → nat, (∑ i : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
f: ⟦ S n' ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ S n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
n': nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n' ⟧ → nat, (∑ i : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
f: ⟦ S n' ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ S n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
≃ ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement ⟧

  
n': nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n' ⟧ → nat, (∑ i : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
f: ⟦ S n' ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ S n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
≃ ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧

  
n': nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n' ⟧ → nat, (∑ i : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
f: ⟦ S n' ⟧ → nat
(∑ j : ⟦ n' ⟧,
 (λ i : ⟦ S n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) (dni lastelement j))
⨿ (λ i : ⟦ S n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) lastelement
≃ ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧

  
n': nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n' ⟧ → nat, (∑ i : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
f: ⟦ S n' ⟧ → nat
(∑ j : ⟦ n' ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧)
≃ ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧

  apply IHn.
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1_prelim f =
(weqfromcoprodofstn
   (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)%functions)
   (f lastelement)
 ∘ (weqcoprodf1
      (weqstnsum1_prelim
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
    ∘ weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))%weq


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1_prelim f =
(weqfromcoprodofstn
   (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)%functions)
   (f lastelement)
 ∘ (weqcoprodf1
      (weqstnsum1_prelim
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
    ∘ weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))%weq

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1_prelim f =
(weqfromcoprodofstn
   (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)%functions)
   (f lastelement)
 ∘ (weqcoprodf1
      (weqstnsum1_prelim
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
    ∘ weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))%weq

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f

  
n: nat
∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f

  
∏ f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
∏ f : ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f

  
∏ f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqstnsum1_prelim f ij = weqstnsum_map f ij
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
⟦ 0 ⟧
 exact (pr1 ij).
  
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
∏ f : ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
 
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f

    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
(weqfromcoprodofstn
   (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)%functions)
   (f lastelement)
 ∘ (weqcoprodf1
      (weqstnsum1_prelim
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
    ∘ weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))%weq ~
weqstnsum_map f

    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
(weqfromcoprodofstn
   (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)%functions)
   (f lastelement)
 ∘ (weqcoprodf1
      (weqstnsum1_prelim
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
    ∘ weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))%weq
  ij = weqstnsum_map f ij

    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (weqcoprodf1
     (weqstnsum1_prelim
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqstnsum_map f ij

    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (weqcoprodf
     (weqstnsum1_prelim
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqstnsum_map f ij

    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum1_prelim
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqstnsum_map f ij

    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum1_prelim
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij))
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqstnsum_map f ij

    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum1_prelim
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij))
 
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
coprodf
  (weqstnsum1_prelim
     (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
  (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
  (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij) =
coprodf
  (weqstnsum_map (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
  (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
  (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)

      
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqstnsum1_prelim (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ~
weqstnsum_map (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧) ~ idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)

      
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqstnsum1_prelim (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ~
weqstnsum_map (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
 apply I.
      
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧) ~ idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)
 
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
x: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧) x =
idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧) x
 apply idpath.
    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
weqstnsum1_prelim f ~ weqstnsum_map f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqstnsum_map f ij
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij)) =
weqstnsum_map f ij

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧
weqstnsum_map f ij =
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij))

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
∏ ij : ∑ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧,
weqstnsum_map f ij =
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ij))

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum_map f
∘ invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)) ~
(λ c : (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧)
       ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧,
 weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
   (f lastelement)
   (coprodf
      (weqstnsum_map
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
      (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c))

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
c: (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧)
⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
(weqstnsum_map f
 ∘ invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))
  c =
weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c)

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
c: (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧)
⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
weqstnsum_map f
  (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
     c) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c)

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
c: (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧)
⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) c) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c)

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
c: (∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧)
⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) c) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c)

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
jk: ∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inl jk)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inl jk))
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inr k)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inr k))

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
jk: ∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inl jk)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inl jk))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
jk: ∑ j : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inl jk)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) jk))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f
  (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inl (j,, k))) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) (j,, k)))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (dni lastelement j,, k) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) (j,, k)))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (dni lastelement j,, k) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
         ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧,
   ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement ⟧)
  (λ i : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧,
   stn_left (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
     (f lastelement) i)
  (λ i : ⟦ f lastelement ⟧,
   stn_right (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
     (f lastelement) i)
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) (j,, k)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (dni lastelement j,, k) =
stn_left (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (weqstnsum_map (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
     (j,, k))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
make_stn (stnsum f)
  (stnsum
     (f
      ∘ stn_left''
          (stnlt (pr1 (dni lastelement j,, k)))) +
   pr2 (dni lastelement j,, k))
  (_c_ (dni lastelement j,, k)) =
stn_left (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (make_stn
     (stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (stnsum
        ((λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
         ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (pr1 (j,, k)))) +
      pr2 (j,, k)) (_c_ (j,, k)))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: ⟦ f (dni lastelement j) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
pr1
  (make_stn (stnsum f)
     (stnsum
        (f
         ∘ stn_left''
             (stnlt (pr1 (dni lastelement j,, k)))) +
      pr2 (dni lastelement j,, k))
     (_c_ (dni lastelement j,, k))) =
pr1
  (stn_left (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
     (f lastelement)
     (make_stn
        (stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
        (stnsum
           ((λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
            ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (pr1 (j,, k)))) +
         pr2 (j,, k)) (_c_ (j,, k))))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: nat
K: k < f (dni lastelement j)
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
pr1
  (make_stn (stnsum f)
     (stnsum
        (f
         ∘ stn_left''
             (stnlt (pr1 (dni lastelement j,, k,, K)))) +
      pr2 (dni lastelement j,, k,, K))
     (_c_ (dni lastelement j,, k,, K))) =
pr1
  (stn_left (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
     (f lastelement)
     (make_stn
        (stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
        (stnsum
           ((λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
            ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (pr1 (j,, k,, K)))) +
         pr2 (j,, k,, K)) (_c_ (j,, k,, K))))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: nat
K: k < f (dni lastelement j)
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
stnsum
  (f
   ∘ stn_left''
       (coprod_rect
          (λ c : (natgtb n j = true)
                 ⨿ (match n with
                    | 0 => true
                    | S m => natgtb j m
                    end = true),
           match
             match c with
             | inl _ => stntonat n j
             | inr _ => S j
             end
           with
           | 0 => true
           | S m => natgtb n m
           end = true)
          (λ _ : natgtb n j = true,
           natgthtogths n j (pr2 j))
          (λ _ : match n with
                 | 0 => true
                 | S m => natgtb j m
                 end = true, pr2 j) (natlthorgeh j n))) +
k =
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
   ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt j)) + k

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: nat
K: k < f (dni lastelement j)
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
stnsum
  (f
   ∘ stn_left''
       (coprod_rect
          (λ c : (natgtb n j = true)
                 ⨿ (match n with
                    | 0 => true
                    | S m => natgtb j m
                    end = true),
           match
             match c with
             | inl _ => stntonat n j
             | inr _ => S j
             end
           with
           | 0 => true
           | S m => natgtb n m
           end = true)
          (λ _ : natgtb n j = true,
           natgthtogths n j (pr2 j))
          (λ _ : match n with
                 | 0 => true
                 | S m => natgtb j m
                 end = true, pr2 j) (natlthorgeh j n))) =
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
   ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt j))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
k: nat
K: k < f (dni lastelement j)
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ match natlthorgeh (pr1 j) n with
           | inl _ => pr1 j
           | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
           end ⟧,
   f
     (stn_left''
        (coprod_rect
           (λ c : (natgtb n (pr1 j) = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                     end = true),
            match
              match c with
              | inl _ => pr1 j
              | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
              end
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n m
            end = true)
           (λ _ : natgtb n (pr1 j) = true,
            natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j))
           (λ _ : match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                  end = true, pr2 j)
           (natlthorgeh (pr1 j) n)) x)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) x)))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ match natlthorgeh (pr1 j) n with
           | inl _ => pr1 j
           | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
           end ⟧,
   f
     (stn_left''
        (coprod_rect
           (λ c : (natgtb n (pr1 j) = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                     end = true),
            match
              match c with
              | inl _ => pr1 j
              | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
              end
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n m
            end = true)
           (λ _ : natgtb n (pr1 j) = true,
            natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j))
           (λ _ : match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                  end = true, pr2 j)
           (natlthorgeh (pr1 j) n)) x)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) x)))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f
     (stn_left''
        (coprod_rect
           (λ c : (natgtb n (pr1 j) = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                     end = true),
            match
              match c with
              | inl _ => pr1 j
              | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
              end
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n m
            end = true)
           (λ _ : natgtb n (pr1 j) = true,
            natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j))
           (λ _ : match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                  end = true, pr2 j) (inl G)) x)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) x)))
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G': pr1 j ≥ n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ S (pr1 j) ⟧,
   f
     (stn_left''
        (coprod_rect
           (λ c : (natgtb n (pr1 j) = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                     end = true),
            match
              match c with
              | inl _ => pr1 j
              | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
              end
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n m
            end = true)
           (λ _ : natgtb n (pr1 j) = true,
            natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j))
           (λ _ : match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                  end = true, pr2 j) (inr G')) x)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) x)))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f
     (stn_left''
        (coprod_rect
           (λ c : (natgtb n (pr1 j) = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                     end = true),
            match
              match c with
              | inl _ => pr1 j
              | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
              end
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n m
            end = true)
           (λ _ : natgtb n (pr1 j) = true,
            natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j))
           (λ _ : match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                  end = true, pr2 j) (inl G)) x)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) x)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (stn_left'' (natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j)) x)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) x)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n
k: ⟦ pr1 j ⟧
f (stn_left'' (natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j)) k) =
f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) k))

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n

stn_left'' (natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j)) k =

P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n

n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n

k = di n k

           
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G: pr1 j < n
k: ⟦ pr1 j ⟧
k < n

           exact (istransnatlth _ _ _ (stnlt k) G).
        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G': pr1 j ≥ n
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ S (pr1 j) ⟧,
   f
     (stn_left''
        (coprod_rect
           (λ c : (natgtb n (pr1 j) = true)
                  ⨿ (match n with
                     | 0 => true
                     | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                     end = true),
            match
              match c with
              | inl _ => pr1 j
              | inr _ => S (pr1 j)
              end
            with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb n m
            end = true)
           (λ _ : natgtb n (pr1 j) = true,
            natgthtogths n (pr1 j) (pr2 j))
           (λ _ : match n with
                  | 0 => true
                  | S m => natgtb (pr1 j) m
                  end = true, pr2 j) (inr G')) x)) =
stnsum
  (λ x : ⟦ pr1 j ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement (stn_left'' (stnlt j) x)))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
j: ⟦ n ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
G': pr1 j ≥ n
∅
 exact (natlthtonegnatgeh _ _ (stnlt j) G').
      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inr k)) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inr k))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (lastelement,, k) =
weqfromcoprodofstn_map (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement)
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_map
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idfun (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inr k))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
weqstnsum_map f (lastelement,, k) =
stn_right (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement) k

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
make_stn (stnsum f)
  (stnsum
     (f ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (pr1 (lastelement,, k)))) +
   pr2 (lastelement,, k)) (_c_ (lastelement,, k)) =
stn_right (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
  (f lastelement) k

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
pr1
  (make_stn (stnsum f)
     (stnsum
        (f
         ∘ stn_left'' (stnlt (pr1 (lastelement,, k)))) +
      pr2 (lastelement,, k)) (_c_ (lastelement,, k))) =
pr1
  (stn_right (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
     (f lastelement) k)

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: nat
K: k < f lastelement
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
pr1
  (make_stn (stnsum f)
     (stnsum
        (f
         ∘ stn_left''
             (stnlt (pr1 (lastelement,, k,, K)))) +
      pr2 (lastelement,, k,, K))
     (_c_ (lastelement,, k,, K))) =
pr1
  (stn_right (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
     (f lastelement) (k,, K))

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: nat
K: k < f lastelement

stnsum (f ∘ stn_left'' (natgthsnn n)) + k =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + k

n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
invweq (weqstnsum1_prelim f) ~ weqstnsum_invmap f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
invweq
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)%functions)
     (f lastelement)
   ∘ (weqcoprodf1
        (weqstnsum1_prelim
           (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
      ∘ weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))%weq ~
weqstnsum_invmap f

  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement)%functions)
     (f lastelement)
   ∘ (weqcoprodf1
        (weqstnsum1_prelim
           (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
      ∘ weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)))%weq
  k = weqstnsum_invmap f k

        (weqstnsum1_prelim
           (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))))
 ∘ invweq

∏
c : ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
    ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧,
coprodf
  (invweq
     (weqstnsum1_prelim
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))))
  (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c =

  (weqstnsum_invmap
     (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
  (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c

  (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c =

k: ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
c: ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
invweq
  (weqstnsum1_prelim
     (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))) ~
weqstnsum_invmap (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i))
 apply I.
      
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
invweq (weqstnsum1_prelim f) ~ weqstnsum_invmap f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
c: ⟦ stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) ⟧
⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧) ~ idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)
 apply homotrefl.
    
n: nat
I: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
invweq (weqstnsum1_prelim f) ~ weqstnsum_invmap f
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (invmap
        (weqfromcoprodofstn
           (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
           (f lastelement)) k)) = weqstnsum_invmap f k
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
k: ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (invmap
        (weqfromcoprodofstn
           (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
           (f lastelement)) k)) = weqstnsum_invmap f k

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
∏ k : ⟦ stnsum f ⟧,
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧))
     (invmap
        (weqfromcoprodofstn
           (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
           (f lastelement)) k)) = weqstnsum_invmap f k

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
(λ c : ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
       ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧,
 invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
   (coprodf
      (weqstnsum_invmap
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
      (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c)) ~
weqstnsum_invmap f
∘ weqfromcoprodofstn (stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement))
    (f lastelement)

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
(λ c : ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
       ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧,
 invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
   (coprodf
      (weqstnsum_invmap
         (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
      (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c)) ~
(λ x : ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
       ⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧,
 weqstnsum_invmap f
   (weqfromcoprodofstn
      (stnsum (λ x0 : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x0)))
      (f lastelement) x))

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
c: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
⨿ ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) c) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) c)

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inl r)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inl r))
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
s: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inr s)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr s))

      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inl r)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inl r))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) r)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inl r))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) r)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inl r))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P)
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) r)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inl r))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P)
  (inl
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) r)) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
  (weqstnsum_invmap (f ∘ dni lastelement) r)

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P)
  (inl (weqstnsum_invmap (f ∘ dni lastelement) r)) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement)
  (weqstnsum_invmap (f ∘ dni lastelement) r)

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
ij: ∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ (f ∘ dni lastelement) i ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inl ij) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement) ij

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
r: ⟦ stnsum (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
i: ⟦ n ⟧
j: ⟦ (f ∘ dni lastelement) i ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inl (i,, j)) =
total2_base_map (dni lastelement) (i,, j)

        apply idpath.
      
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
s: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (coprodf
     (weqstnsum_invmap
        (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)))
     (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧)) (inr s)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr s))
 
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
s: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod (λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧))
  (inr (idweq (⟦ f lastelement ⟧) s)) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr s))

  (inr s) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr s))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
s: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inr s) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr s))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
s: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inr s) =
weqstnsum_invmap f
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_map
     (stnsum (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)))
     (f lastelement) (inr s))

        
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
s: ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
P:= λ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧: ⟦ S n ⟧ → Type
invmap (weqoverdnicoprod P) (inr s) = lastelement,, s

        apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
 use (remakeweqboth (weqstnsum1_prelim_eq _) (weqstnsum1_prelim_eq' _)).
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1 f = weqstnsum_map f

weqstnsum1 f = weqstnsum_map f

f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
weqstnsum1 f = weqstnsum_map f

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
invmap (weqstnsum1 f) = weqstnsum_invmap f


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
invmap (weqstnsum1 f) = weqstnsum_invmap f

f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
invmap (weqstnsum1 f) = weqstnsum_invmap f

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i)
→ (∑ y, P y) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧


n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i)
→ (∑ y, P y) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∑ y, P y) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∑ y, P y) ≃ (∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∑ y, P y) ≃ (∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧)
 
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ (∑ y, P y)
 
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f x ⟧ ≃ P x
 assumption.
  
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∑ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧) ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧
 apply weqstnsum1.
Defined.


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
g: X → ⟦ n ⟧
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ hfiber g i) → X ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
g: X → ⟦ n ⟧
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ hfiber g i) → X ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
g: X → ⟦ n ⟧
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ hfiber g i
X ≃ ⟦ stnsum f ⟧

  
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
g: X → ⟦ n ⟧
w: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ hfiber g i
X ≃ (∑ y, hfiber g y)

  apply weqtococonusf.
Defined.

(** lexical enumeration of pairs of natural numbers *)

Definition lexicalEnumeration {n : nat} (m: ⟦n⟧ -> nat) :
  ⟦stnsum m⟧ ≃ (∑ i : ⟦n⟧, ⟦m i⟧) := invweq (weqstnsum1 m).

Definition inverse_lexicalEnumeration {n : nat} (m: ⟦n⟧ -> nat) :
  (∑ i : ⟦n⟧, ⟦m i⟧) ≃ ⟦stnsum m⟧ := weqstnsum1 m.

(** two generalizations of stnsum, potentially useful *)


E: Type
e: E
m: binop E
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ → E
E


E: Type
e: E
m: binop E
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ → E
E

  
E: Type
e: E
m: binop E
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ → E
E

  
E: Type
e: E
m: binop E
x: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → E
E
E: Type
e: E
m: binop E
n: nat
x: ⟦ S n ⟧ → E
foldleft: (⟦ n ⟧ → E) → E
E

  
E: Type
e: E
m: binop E
x: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → E
E
 exact e.
  
E: Type
e: E
m: binop E
n: nat
x: ⟦ S n ⟧ → E
foldleft: (⟦ n ⟧ → E) → E
E
 exact (m (foldleft (x ∘ (dni lastelement))) (x lastelement)).
Defined.


E: UU
m: binop E
e: E
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ → E
E


E: UU
m: binop E
e: E
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ → E
E

m: binop E
e: E
n: nat
x: ⟦ n ⟧ → E
E

  
E: UU
m: binop E
e: E
x: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → E
E
E: UU
m: binop E
e: E
n: nat
x: ⟦ S n ⟧ → E
foldright: (⟦ n ⟧ → E) → E
E

  
E: UU
m: binop E
e: E
x: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → E
E
 exact e.
  
E: UU
m: binop E
e: E
n: nat
x: ⟦ S n ⟧ → E
foldright: (⟦ n ⟧ → E) → E
E
 exact (m (x firstelement) (foldright (x ∘ dni firstelement))).
Defined.

(** *** Weak equivalence between the direct product of [ stn n ] and [ stn m ] and [ stn n * m ] *)


n, m: nat
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧


n, m: nat
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧
n, m: nat
i: m ≤ 0
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧

  
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧
 
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧

    
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
 
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i, j: nat
li: i < n
lj: j < m
j + i * m < n * m

      
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i, j: nat
li: i < n
lj: j < m
j + i * m < S i * m
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i, j: nat
li: i < n
lj: j < m
S i * m ≤ n * m

      
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i, j: nat
li: i < n
lj: j < m
j + i * m < S i * m
 
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i, j: nat
li: i < n
lj: j < m
j + i * m < i * m + m

        
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i, j: nat
li: i < n
lj: j < m
i * m + j < i * m + m

        exact (natgthandplusl m j ( i * m ) lj ).
      
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i, j: nat
li: i < n
lj: j < m
S i * m ≤ n * m
 exact ( natlehandmultr ( S i ) n m ( natgthtogehsn _ _ li ) ).
    
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧
 
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
f:= λ ij : ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧,
let ij0 := ij in
let i := pr1 ij0 in
let j := pr2 ij0 in
make_stn (n * m) (j + i * m)
  (i1 i j (pr2 i) (pr2 j)): ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n * m ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n * m ⟧

      
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
f:= λ ij : ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧,
let ij0 := ij in
let i := pr1 ij0 in
let j := pr2 ij0 in
make_stn (n * m) (j + i * m)
  (i1 i j (pr2 i) (pr2 j)): ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n * m ⟧
isweq f

is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m

li: i < n
j: nat

li': i' < n
j': nat
lj': j' < m
e: f ((i,, li),, j,, lj) = f ((i',, li'),, j',, lj')
e': j + i * m = j' + i' * m
eei: i = i'
eeis:= invmaponpathsincl (stntonat n)
  (isinclstntonat n) (make_stn n i li)
  (make_stn n i' li') eei: make_stn n i li = make_stn n i' li'
(i,, li),, j,, lj = (i',, li'),, j',, lj'

li: i < n
j: nat
lj: j < m
i': nat
li': i' < n
j': nat
lj': j' < m
e: f ((i,, li),, j,, lj) = f ((i',, li'),, j',, lj')

eeis:= invmaponpathsincl (stntonat n)
  (isinclstntonat n) (make_stn n i li)
  (make_stn n i' li') eei: make_stn n i li = make_stn n i' li'
eej: j = j'

n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
f:= λ ij : ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧,
let ij0 := ij in
let i := pr1 ij0 in
let j := pr2 ij0 in
make_stn (n * m) (j + i * m)
  (i1 i j (pr2 i) (pr2 j)): ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n * m ⟧
i: nat
li: i < n
j: nat
lj: j < m
i': nat
li': i' < n
j': nat
lj': j' < m
e: f ((i,, li),, j,, lj) = f ((i',, li'),, j',, lj')
e': j + i * m = j' + i' * m
eei: i = i'
eeis:= invmaponpathsincl (stntonat n)
  (isinclstntonat n) (make_stn n i li)
  (make_stn n i' li') eei: make_stn n i li = make_stn n i' li'
eej: j = j'
eejs:= invmaponpathsincl (stntonat m)
  (isinclstntonat m) (make_stn m j lj)
  (make_stn m j' lj') eej: make_stn m j lj = make_stn m j' lj'
(i,, li),, j,, lj = (i',, li'),, j',, lj'

        apply ( pathsdirprod eeis eejs ).
      
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
f:= λ ij : ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧,
let ij0 := ij in
let i := pr1 ij0 in
let j := pr2 ij0 in
make_stn (n * m) (j + i * m)
  (i1 i j (pr2 i) (pr2 j)): ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n * m ⟧
isinf: isincl f
isweq f
 
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m
f:= λ ij : ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧,
let ij0 := ij in
let i := pr1 ij0 in
let j := pr2 ij0 in
make_stn (n * m) (j + i * m)
  (i1 i j (pr2 i) (pr2 j)): ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n * m ⟧
isinf: isincl f
xnm: ⟦ n * m ⟧
iscontr (hfiber f xnm)

        
n, m: nat
is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m

let ij0 := ij in
let i := pr1 ij0 in
let j := pr2 ij0 in
make_stn (n * m) (j + i * m)
  (i1 i j (pr2 i) (pr2 j)): ⟦ n ⟧ × ⟦ m ⟧ → ⟦ n * m ⟧
isinf: isincl f
xnm: ⟦ n * m ⟧
isaprop (hfiber f xnm)

hfiber f xnm

xnm: nat
lxnm: xnm < n * m

is: m > 0
i1: ∏ i j : nat, i < n → j < m → j + i * m < n * m

xnm: nat
lxnm: xnm < n * m
e:= ! natdivremrule (xnm,, lxnm) m (natgthtoneq m 0 is): (xnm,, lxnm) /+ m + (xnm,, lxnm) / m * m =
xnm,, lxnm
i:= (xnm,, lxnm) / m: nat
j:= (xnm,, lxnm) /+ m: nat
li:= natlthandmultrinv (xnm / m) n m
  (natlehlthtrans (xnm / m * m) xnm 
     (n * m)
     (natlehmultnatdiv xnm m (natgthtoneq m 0 is))
     lxnm): xnm / m < n
hfiber f (xnm,, lxnm)

xnm: nat

     lxnm): xnm / m < n
lj:= lthnatrem xnm m (natgthtoneq m 0 is): xnm /+ m < m
f (make_dirprod (make_stn n i li) (make_stn m j lj)) =
xnm,, lxnm

xnm,, lxnm
i:= (xnm,, lxnm) / m: nat

     lxnm): xnm / m < n

j + i * m = xnm

i: m ≤ 0

e:= natleh0tois0 i: m = 0
isweq pr2
   apply ( isweqtoempty2 _ ( weqstn0toempty ) ).
Defined.

(** *** Weak equivalences between decidable subsets of [ stn n ] and [ stn x ] *)


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

  
n: nat
∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

  
∏ f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
∏ f : ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

  
∏ f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool
hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧

    
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool
hfiber f true → ⟦ 0 ⟧
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool
g: hfiber f true → ⟦ 0 ⟧
hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧

hfiber f true → ⟦ 0 ⟧
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool
hf: hfiber f true
⟦ 0 ⟧

      
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool
i: ⟦ 0 ⟧
e: f i = true
⟦ 0 ⟧

      destruct ( weqstn0toempty i ).
    
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → bool
g: hfiber f true → ⟦ 0 ⟧
hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧

    apply ( weqtoempty2 g weqstn0toempty ).
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
∏ f : ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 1 + n ⟧
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true

      
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
∏ x : ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧, f (g x) = sumofmaps fl fh x
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
h: ∏ x : ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧, f (g x) = sumofmaps fl fh x
hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true

      
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
∏ x : ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧, f (g x) = sumofmaps fl fh x
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
x: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧
f (g x) = sumofmaps fl fh x

        
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
x1: ⟦ 1 ⟧
f (g (inl x1)) = sumofmaps fl fh (inl x1)
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
xn: ⟦ n ⟧
f (g (inr xn)) = sumofmaps fl fh (inr xn)

        
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
x1: ⟦ 1 ⟧
f (g (inl x1)) = sumofmaps fl fh (inl x1)
 apply idpath.
        
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
xn: ⟦ n ⟧
f (g (inr xn)) = sumofmaps fl fh (inr xn)
 apply idpath.
      
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
int:= invweq (weqhfibersgwtog g f true): hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (f ∘ g) true
h: ∏ x : ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧, f (g x) = sumofmaps fl fh x
hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true

      apply ( weqcomp int ( weqhfibershomot _ _ h true ) ).
    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): (λ x : nat, hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧)
  (pr1 (IHn fh))
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧

fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool

w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool

x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
i: fl lastelement = true
∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool

w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true

w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
i: fl lastelement = true
iscontr (hfiber fl true)

IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧

is: iscontr (hfiber fl true)
hfiber fl true ≃ ⟦ 1 ⟧

n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
i: fl lastelement = true
isaprop (hfiber fl true)
 apply ( isinclfromstn1 fl isasetbool true ).
          
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
i: fl lastelement = true
hfiber fl true
 apply ( make_hfiber _ lastelement i ).
        
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
i: fl lastelement = true
is: iscontr (hfiber fl true)
hfiber fl true ≃ ⟦ 1 ⟧

        apply ( weqcontrcontr is iscontrstn1 ).
      
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
i: fl lastelement = true
wi: hfiber fl true ≃ ⟦ 1 ⟧
hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ S x0 ⟧

      apply ( weqcomp ( weqcomp w' ( weqcoprodf wi w0 ) ) ( weqfromcoprodofstn 1 _ ) ).

fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool

¬ hfiber fl true
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
ni: fl lastelement = false
g': ¬ hfiber fl true
hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧

      
n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
ni: fl lastelement = false
¬ hfiber fl true

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool

ni: fl lastelement = false
j: ⟦ 1 ⟧
e: fl j = true
∅

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧

 apply proofirrelevancecontr, iscontrstn1.

IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧

g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧

fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true

n: nat
IHn: ∏ f : ⟦ n ⟧ → bool, ∑ x : nat, hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x ⟧
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → bool
g:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
fl:= λ i : ⟦ 1 ⟧, f (g (inl i)): ⟦ 1 ⟧ → bool
fh:= λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f (g (inr i)): ⟦ n ⟧ → bool
w: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps fl fh) true
w':= (invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps fl fh true) ∘ w)%weq: hfiber f true ≃ hfiber fl true ⨿ hfiber fh true
x0:= pr1 (IHn fh): nat
w0:= pr2 (IHn fh): hfiber fh true ≃ ⟦ pr1 (IHn fh) ⟧
ni: fl lastelement = false
g': ¬ hfiber fl true
hfiber f true ≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧

      apply ( weqcomp w' ( weqcomp ( invweq ( weqii2withneg _ g' ) ) w0 )  ).
Defined.

(** *** Weak equivalences between hfibers of functions from [ stn n ] over isolated points and [ stn x ] *)


n: nat
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
∑ x0 : nat, hfiber f x ≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧


n: nat
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
∑ x0 : nat, hfiber f x ≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧

  
n: nat
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
∑ x0 : nat, hfiber f x ≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧

  
n: nat
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
t:= weqfromdecsubsetofstn
  (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, eqbx X x is (f i)): ∑ x0 : nat,
hfiber (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, eqbx X x is (f i)) true
≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧
∑ x0 : nat, hfiber f x ≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧

  
n: nat
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
t:= weqfromdecsubsetofstn
  (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, eqbx X x is (f i)): ∑ x0 : nat,
hfiber (λ i : ⟦ n ⟧, eqbx X x is (f i)) true
≃ ⟦ x0 ⟧
hfiber f x ≃ ⟦ pr1 t ⟧

  apply ( weqcomp ( weqhfibertobhfiber f x is ) ( pr2 t ) ).
Defined.





(** *** Weak equivalence between [ stn n -> stn m ] and [ stn ( natpower m n ) ] ( uses functional extensionality ) *)



n, m: nat
(⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧


n, m: nat
(⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧

  
n: nat
∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧

  
∏ m : nat, (⟦ 0 ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m 0 ⟧
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
∏ m : nat, (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m (S n) ⟧

  
∏ m : nat, (⟦ 0 ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m 0 ⟧
 
m: nat
(⟦ 0 ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m 0 ⟧

    
m: nat
iscontr (⟦ 0 ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
m: nat
iscontr (⟦ natpower m 0 ⟧)

    
m: nat
iscontr (⟦ 0 ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
 apply ( iscontrfunfromempty2 _ weqstn0toempty ).
    
m: nat
iscontr (⟦ natpower m 0 ⟧)
 apply iscontrstn1.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
∏ m : nat, (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m (S n) ⟧
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
m: nat
(⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m (S n) ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
m: nat
w1:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 1 + n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m (S n) ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
m: nat
w1:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 1 + n ⟧
w2: (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ (⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
(⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m (S n) ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
m: nat
w1:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 1 + n ⟧
w2: (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ (⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
w3:= (weqfunfromcoprodtoprod (⟦ 1 ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧)
 ∘ w2)%weq: (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
≃ (⟦ 1 ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) × (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
(⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m (S n) ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat, (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
m: nat
w1:= weqfromcoprodofstn 1 n: ⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 1 + n ⟧
w2: (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ (⟦ 1 ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
w3:= (weqfunfromcoprodtoprod (⟦ 1 ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ m ⟧)
 ∘ w2)%weq: (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
≃ (⟦ 1 ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) × (⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧)
w4:= (weqdirprodf (weqfunfromcontr (⟦ m ⟧) iscontrstn1)
   (IHn m) ∘ w3)%weq: (⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ m ⟧ × ⟦ natpower m n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ → ⟦ m ⟧) ≃ ⟦ natpower m (S n) ⟧

    apply ( weqcomp w4 ( weqfromprodofstn m ( natpower m n ) ) ).
Defined.





(** *** Weak equivalence from the space of functions of a family [ stn ( f x ) ]  over [ stn n ] to [ stn ( stnprod n f ) ] ( uses functional extensionality ) *)



n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
nat


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
nat

  
n: nat
(⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat

  
(⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) → nat
