IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat
(⟦ S n ⟧ → nat) → nat

  
(⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat) → nat
 
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
nat

    apply 1.
  
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat
(⟦ S n ⟧ → nat) → nat
 
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ → nat) → nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
nat

    apply (  ( IHn ( λ i : ⟦n⟧, f ( dni lastelement i ) ) ) * f lastelement ).
Defined.


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
stnprod f =
stnprod (f ∘ dni lastelement) * f lastelement


n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
stnprod f =
stnprod (f ∘ dni lastelement) * f lastelement

  
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
stnprod f =
stnprod (f ∘ dni lastelement) * f lastelement

  apply idpath.
Defined.


n: nat
f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g

f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g

f, g: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
stnprod f = stnprod g
 
f, g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
stnprod f = stnprod g

f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g
stnprod f = stnprod g

h: f ~ g
stnprod f = stnprod g
 apply idpath.

f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g
stnprod f = stnprod g

  
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g
stnprod (f ∘ dni lastelement) * f lastelement =
stnprod (g ∘ dni lastelement) * g lastelement
 
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g
stnprod (f ∘ dni lastelement) * f lastelement =
stnprod (g ∘ dni lastelement) * f lastelement

  
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g
stnprod (f ∘ dni lastelement) =
stnprod (g ∘ dni lastelement)
 
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g
f ∘ dni lastelement ~ g ∘ dni lastelement
 
n: nat
f, g: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
h: f ~ g
IH: ∏ f g : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat,
f ~ g → stnprod f = stnprod g
x: ⟦ n ⟧
(f ∘ dni lastelement) x = (g ∘ dni lastelement) x
 apply h.
Defined.


n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧


n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

  
n: nat
∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i)
→ (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

  
∏ (P : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i)
→ (∏ x : ⟦ 0 ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
∏ (P : ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i)
→ (∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

  
∏ (P : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i)
→ (∏ x : ⟦ 0 ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
 
P: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∏ x : ⟦ 0 ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
 
P: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∏ x : ⟦ 0 ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ 1 ⟧
 
P: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
iscontr (∏ x : ⟦ 0 ⟧, P x)
P: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
iscontr (⟦ 1 ⟧)

    
P: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
iscontr (∏ x : ⟦ 0 ⟧, P x)
 apply ( iscontrsecoverempty2 _ ( negstn0 ) ).
    
P: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
iscontr (⟦ 1 ⟧)
 apply iscontrstn1.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
∏ (P : ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i)
→ (∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w2: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x))
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w2: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x))
w3: (∏ xy : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit,
 (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x)) xy)
≃ (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
   (λ x0 : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x0)) (inl x))
  × (∏ y : unit,
     (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x)) (inr y))
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w4: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
   (λ x0 : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x0)) (inl x))
  × (∏ y : unit,
     (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x)) (inr y))
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w4: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
   (λ x0 : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x0)) (inl x))
  × (∏ y : unit,
     (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x)) (inr y))
w5: (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, (λ x0 : ⟦ n ⟧, P (w1 (inl x0))) x)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (w1 (inl x))) ⟧
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w6: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (w1 (inl x))) ⟧
  × (λ t : unit,
     (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit, P (w1 x)) (inr t)) tt
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w6: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x))
  ⟧ × P lastelement
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w6: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x))
  ⟧ × P lastelement
w7: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x))
  ⟧ × ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
(∏ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w6: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x))
  ⟧ × P lastelement
w7: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x))
  ⟧ × ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)) ⟧
× ⟦ f lastelement ⟧ ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (P : ⟦ n ⟧ → UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → nat),
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i) → (∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, P x) ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧
P: ⟦ S n ⟧ → UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → nat
ww: ∏ i : ⟦ S n ⟧, ⟦ f i ⟧ ≃ P i
w1:= weqdnicoprod n lastelement: ⟦ n ⟧ ⨿ unit ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
w6: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x))
  ⟧ × P lastelement
w7: (∏ y : ⟦ S n ⟧, P y)
≃ ⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x))
  ⟧ × ⟦ f lastelement ⟧
⟦ stnprod (λ x : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement x)) ⟧
× ⟦ f lastelement ⟧ ≃ ⟦ stnprod f ⟧

    exact (weqfromprodofstn _ _ ).
Defined.

(** *** Weak equivalence between [ ( stn n ) ≃ ( stn n ) ] and [ stn ( factorial n ) ] ( uses functional extensionality ) *)


n: nat
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ × (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)


n: nat
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ × (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)

  
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ × (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)

  
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧)
≃ isolated (⟦ S n ⟧)
  × (compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l)
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
isolated (⟦ S n ⟧)
× (compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l)
≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ × (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)

  
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧)
≃ isolated (⟦ S n ⟧)
  × (compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l)
 
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
isisolated (⟦ S n ⟧) l
 
n: nat
l, i: ⟦ S n ⟧
(l = i) ⨿ (l != i)
 apply isdeceqstn. 
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
isolated (⟦ S n ⟧)
× (compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l)
≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ × (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)

  
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
isolated (⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
(compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l)
≃ (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)

  
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
isolated (⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
 apply weqisolatedstntostn.
  
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
(compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l)
≃ (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)
 
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l ≃ ⟦ n ⟧
 
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l

    
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ ≃ compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) l (stnneq l)
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) l (stnneq l) ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l

    
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ n ⟧ ≃ compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) l (stnneq l)
 apply weqdnicompl.
    
n: nat
l: ⟦ S n ⟧
compl_ne (⟦ S n ⟧) l (stnneq l) ≃ compl (⟦ S n ⟧) l
 apply compl_weq_compl_ne.
Defined.


n: nat
(⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial n ⟧


n: nat
(⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial n ⟧

  
(⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial 0 ⟧
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial (S n) ⟧

  
(⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial 0 ⟧
 
(⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧) ≃ ⟦ 1 ⟧

    
iscontr (⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
iscontr (⟦ 1 ⟧)

    
iscontr (⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
 
isaprop (⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧

      
isaprop (⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧)
 apply ( isapropweqtoempty2 _ ( negstn0 ) ).
      
⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧
 apply idweq.
    
iscontr (⟦ 1 ⟧)
 apply iscontrstn1.
  
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial (S n) ⟧
 
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial n ⟧
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n * factorial n ⟧

    
n: nat
IHn: (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ factorial n ⟧
w1:= weqweqstnsn n: (⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ × (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧)
(⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧) ≃ ⟦ S n * factorial n ⟧

    apply ( weqcomp w1 ( weqcomp ( weqdirprodf ( idweq _ ) IHn ) ( weqfromprodofstn _ _ ) ) ).
Defined.


(* End of " weak equivalences between standard finite sets and constructions on these sets ". *)







(** ** Standard finite sets satisfy weak axiom of choice *)


n: nat
ischoicebase (⟦ n ⟧)


n: nat
ischoicebase (⟦ n ⟧)

  
ischoicebase (⟦ 0 ⟧)
n: nat
IHn: ischoicebase (⟦ n ⟧)
ischoicebase (⟦ S n ⟧)

  
ischoicebase (⟦ 0 ⟧)
 apply ( ischoicebaseempty2 negstn0 ).
  
n: nat
IHn: ischoicebase (⟦ n ⟧)
ischoicebase (⟦ S n ⟧)
 apply ( ischoicebaseweqf ( weqdnicoprod n lastelement )
                             ( ischoicebasecoprod IHn ischoicebaseunit ) ).
Defined.







(** ** Weak equivalence class of [ stn n ] determines [ n ]. *)



n: nat
¬ (⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧)


n: nat
¬ (⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧)

  
n: nat
⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧ → ∅

  
n: nat
lp: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧ → ∅

  
n: nat
lp: ⟦ S n ⟧
X: ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧
∅

  
n: nat
lp: ⟦ S n ⟧
X: ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧
⟦ 0 ⟧

  apply (pr1 X lp).
Defined.


n: nat
¬ (⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧)


n: nat
¬ (⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧)

  
n: nat
⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ → ∅

  
n: nat
lp: ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧ → ∅

  
n: nat
lp: ⟦ S n ⟧
X: ⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
∅

  
n: nat
lp: ⟦ S n ⟧
X: ⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n ⟧
⟦ 0 ⟧

  apply (pr1 ( invweq X ) lp).
Defined.

⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧

w: ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧

n, n': nat
w: ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧

stn_compl (w k) ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧

    
n, n': nat
w: ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧
k: ⟦ S n ⟧
stn_compl k ≃ stn_compl (w k)
 apply weqoncompl_ne.
    
n, n': nat
w: ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧
k: ⟦ S n ⟧
stn_compl (w k) ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧
 apply invweq, weqdnicompl.
Defined.


n, n': nat
⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → n = n'


n, n': nat
⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → n = n'

∏ n' : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → n = n'

IHn: ∏ n' : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → n = n'
∏ n' : nat, ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → S n = n'

       
∏ n' : nat, ⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → 0 = n'
 
n': nat
⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → 0 = n'

⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧ → 0 = S n'

         
⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧ → 0 = 0
 intros; apply idpath.
         
n': nat
⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧ → 0 = S n'
 
n': nat
X: ⟦ 0 ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧
0 = S n'
 apply (fromempty (negweqstn0sn _ X)).
       
n: nat
IHn: ∏ n' : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → n = n'
∏ n' : nat, ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → S n = n'
 
n: nat

⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧ → S n = S n'

n: nat

X: ⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ 0 ⟧
S n = 0
 apply (fromempty ( negweqstnsn0 n X)).

IHn: ∏ n' : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧ → n = n'

⟦ S n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ S n' ⟧ → S n = S n'

∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧, ?g (?f x) = x
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
∏ y : ⟦ n' ⟧, ?f (?g y) = y

  
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n' ⟧
 
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
⟦ n' ⟧

    
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
i: ⟦ n ⟧
i < n'

    abstract exact (transportf (λ x, i < x) H (stnlt i)).
  
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
⟦ n' ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
 
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
i: ⟦ n' ⟧
⟦ n ⟧

    
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
i: ⟦ n' ⟧
i < n

    abstract exact (transportf (λ x, i < x) (!H) (stnlt i)).
  
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
∏ x : ⟦ n ⟧,
(λ i : ⟦ n' ⟧,
 make_stn n i (eqtoweqstn_subproof0 n n' H i))
  ((λ i : ⟦ n ⟧,
    make_stn n' i (eqtoweqstn_subproof n n' H i)) x) =
x
 abstract (intro i; now apply stn_eq).
  
n, n': nat
H: n = n'
∏ y : ⟦ n' ⟧,
(λ i : ⟦ n ⟧,
 make_stn n' i (eqtoweqstn_subproof n n' H i))
  ((λ i : ⟦ n' ⟧,
    make_stn n i (eqtoweqstn_subproof0 n n' H i)) y) =
y
 abstract (intro i; now apply stn_eq).
Defined.


n, n': nat
dw: ¬¬ (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧)
n = n'


n, n': nat
dw: ¬¬ (⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n' ⟧)
n = n'

  apply (eqfromdnegeq nat isdeceqnat _ _  (dnegf (@weqtoeqstn n n') dw)).
Defined.



n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: dni_lastelement i = dni_lastelement j
i = j


n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: dni_lastelement i = dni_lastelement j
i = j

  
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: dni_lastelement i = dni_lastelement j
pr1 i = pr1 j

  
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: pr1 i,, natlthtolths (pr1 i) n (pr2 i) =
pr1 j,, natlthtolths (pr1 j) n (pr2 j)
pr1 i = pr1 j

  
n: nat
i, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: pr1 (pr1 i,, natlthtolths (pr1 i) n (pr2 i)) =
pr1 (pr1 j,, natlthtolths (pr1 j) n (pr2 j))
pr1 i = pr1 j

  exact e.
Defined.


∏ (n : nat) (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (ie : pr1 i < n),
i = dni_lastelement (make_stn n (pr1 i) ie)


∏ (n : nat) (i : ⟦ S n ⟧) (ie : pr1 i < n),
i = dni_lastelement (make_stn n (pr1 i) ie)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
ie: pr1 i < n
i = dni_lastelement (make_stn n (pr1 i) ie)

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
ie: pr1 i < n
pr1 i = pr1 (dni_lastelement (make_stn n (pr1 i) ie))

  apply idpath.
Defined.


∏ (n : nat) (i : ⟦ S n ⟧), pr1 i = n → i = lastelement


∏ (n : nat) (i : ⟦ S n ⟧), pr1 i = n → i = lastelement

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
e: pr1 i = n
i = lastelement

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
e: pr1 i = n
i = n,, natgthsnn n

  
n: nat
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
e: pr1 i = n
pr1 i = pr1 (n,, natgthsnn n)

  apply e.
Defined.

(* a tactic for proving things by induction over a finite number of cases *)
Ltac inductive_reflexivity i b :=
  (* Here i is a variable natural number and b is a bound on *)
  (*      i of the form i<k, where k is a numeral. *)
  induction i as [|i];
  [ try apply isinjstntonat ; apply idpath |
    contradicts (negnatlthn0 i) b || inductive_reflexivity i b ].

(** concatenation and flattening of functions *)


X: UU
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
⟦ m + n ⟧ → X


X: UU
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
⟦ m + n ⟧ → X

  
X: UU
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + n ⟧
X

  (* we are careful to use weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap both here and in weqstnsum_invmap *)
  
X: UU
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + n ⟧
j: ⟦ m ⟧
X
X: UU
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + n ⟧
k: ⟦ n ⟧
X

  
X: UU
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + n ⟧
j: ⟦ m ⟧
X
 exact (f j).
  
X: UU
m, n: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + n ⟧
k: ⟦ n ⟧
X
 exact (g k).
Defined.


X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
concatenate' f g =
transportb (λ n : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (natplusr0 m) f


X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
concatenate' f g =
transportb (λ n : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (natplusr0 m) f

  
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
concatenate' f g =
transportb (λ n : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (natplusr0 m) f
 
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
concatenate' f g i =
transportb (λ n : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (natplusr0 m) f i
 
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧, X)
  (λ j : ⟦ m ⟧, f j) (λ k : ⟦ 0 ⟧, g k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap m 0 i) =
transportb (λ n : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (natplusr0 m) f i

  
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
f (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i) =
transportb (λ n : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (natplusr0 m) f i
 
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
f (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i) =
transportb (λ n : nat, ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (natplusr0 m) f i

  apply transportb_fun'.
Defined.


X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
concatenate' f g i =
f (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i)


X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
concatenate' f g i =
f (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i)

  
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
concatenate' f g i =
f (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i)

  
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧, X)
  (λ j : ⟦ m ⟧, f j) (λ k : ⟦ 0 ⟧, g k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap m 0 i) =
f (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i)

  
X: UU
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
i: ⟦ m + 0 ⟧
coprod_rect (λ _ : ⟦ m ⟧ ⨿ ⟦ 0 ⟧, X)
  (λ j : ⟦ m ⟧, f j) (λ k : ⟦ 0 ⟧, g k)
  (inl (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i)) =
f (transportf stn (natplusr0 m) i)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


X: UU
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧ → X) → ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → X


X: UU
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧ → X) → ⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → X

  
X: UU
n: nat
m: ⟦ n ⟧ → nat
g: ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, ⟦ m i ⟧ → X
⟦ stnsum m ⟧ → X

  exact (uncurry g ∘ invmap (weqstnsum1 m)).
Defined.


n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
k: nat
h, h': k < n
P (k,, h) → P (k,, h')


n: nat

H: P (k,, h)
P (k,, h')

k: nat
h, h': k < n
H: P (k,, h)
h = h'
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
k: nat
h, h': k < n
H: P (k,, h)
X:= ?Goal: h = h'
P (k,, h')

  
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
k: nat
h, h': k < n
H: P (k,, h)
h = h'
 apply propproperty.
  
n: nat
P: ⟦ n ⟧ → UU
k: nat
h, h': k < n
H: P (k,, h)
X:= let X :=
  λ (P : hProp) (x x' : pr1 P),
  pr1 (propproperty P x x') in
X (k < n) h h': h = h'
P (k,, h')
 exact (transportf (λ x, P (k,,x)) X H).
Defined.

(** ordered bijections are unique *)

Definition is_stn_increasing {m : nat} (f : ⟦m⟧ → nat) :=
  ∏ (i j: ⟦m⟧ ), i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j.

Definition is_stn_strictly_increasing {m : nat} (f : ⟦m⟧ → nat) :=
  ∏ (i j: ⟦m⟧ ), i < j → f i < f j.


m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
is_stn_strictly_increasing f → is_stn_increasing f


m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
is_stn_strictly_increasing f → is_stn_increasing f

f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
inc: is_stn_strictly_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i ≤ j
f i ≤ f j

f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
inc: is_stn_strictly_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
I: i < j
f i ≤ f j
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
inc: is_stn_strictly_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
J: i = j
f i ≤ f j

incl: isincl f
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < j
c: f i ≤ f j
b: i != j
T: f i < f j
f i < f j
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
incl: isincl f
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < j
c: f i ≤ f j
b: i != j
U: f i = f j
f i < f j

  
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
incl: isincl f
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < j
c: f i ≤ f j
b: i != j
T: f i < f j
f i < f j
 exact T.
  
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
incl: isincl f
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < j
c: f i ≤ f j
b: i != j
U: f i = f j
f i < f j
 
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
incl: isincl f
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < j
c: f i ≤ f j
b: i != j
U: f i = f j
∅

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
incl: ∏ y : nat, isofhlevel 1 (hfiber f y)
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < j
c: f i ≤ f j
b: i != j
U: f i = f j
∅

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
incl: ∏ y : nat, isofhlevel 1 (hfiber f y)
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i, j: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < j
c: f i ≤ f j
b: i != j
U: f i = f j
V: i = j
∅

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
incl: ∏ y : nat, isofhlevel 1 (hfiber f y)
incr: is_stn_increasing f
i: ⟦ m ⟧
e: i < i
c: f i ≤ f i
b: i != i
U: f i = f i
∅

    exact (isirreflnatlth _ e).
Defined.

(∏ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i ≥ 1) → stnsum f ≥ m

m: nat
f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) = stnsum f + stnsum g

f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) = stnsum f + stnsum g

f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) = stnsum f + stnsum g

m: nat
f, g: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
I: ∏ f g : ⟦ m ⟧ → nat,
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g

  
f, g: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → nat
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧, f i + g i) = stnsum f + stnsum g
 apply idpath.
  
m: nat
f, g: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
I: ∏ f g : ⟦ m ⟧ → nat,
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g
 
m: nat
f, g: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
I: ∏ f g : ⟦ m ⟧ → nat,
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g
stnsum ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧, f i + g i) ∘ dni lastelement) +
(f lastelement + g lastelement) =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement +
(stnsum (g ∘ dni lastelement) + g lastelement)

    
m: nat
f, g: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
I: ∏ f g : ⟦ m ⟧ → nat,
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g
stnsum
  (λ y : ⟦ m ⟧,
   f (dni lastelement y) + g (dni lastelement y)) +
(f lastelement + g lastelement) =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement +
(stnsum (g ∘ dni lastelement) + g lastelement)

    
m: nat
f, g: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
I: ∏ f g : ⟦ m ⟧ → nat,
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) +
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, g (dni lastelement i)) +
(f lastelement + g lastelement) =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement +
(stnsum (g ∘ dni lastelement) + g lastelement)

f, g: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
I: ∏ f g : ⟦ m ⟧ → nat,
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) =
stnsum f + stnsum g
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f (dni lastelement i)) +
(stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, g (dni lastelement i)) +
 (f lastelement + g lastelement)) =
stnsum (f ∘ dni lastelement) + f lastelement +
(stnsum (g ∘ dni lastelement) + g lastelement)

 (f lastelement + g lastelement)) =

f, g: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat

g lastelement +

I: ∏ f g : ⟦ m ⟧ → nat,
stnsum (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + g i) =

g lastelement =

Defined.


m: nat
f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i < g i) → stnsum g ≥ stnsum f + m

f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
(∏ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i < g i) → stnsum g ≥ stnsum f + m

f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat

f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat

f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
X: ∏ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i < g i
h:= λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + 1: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat

m: nat
f, g: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
X: ∏ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i < g i
h:= λ i : ⟦ m ⟧, f i + 1: ⟦ m ⟧ → nat
E: stnsum h = stnsum f + m
i: ⟦ m ⟧
f i < g i
 apply X.
Defined.

Local Arguments dni {_} _ _.


m: nat
f: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement

f: ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement

e: is_stn_increasing f
stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
   f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i)) =
f lastelement - f firstelement

stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧,
   f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i)) =
f lastelement - f firstelement

is_stn_increasing f

    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -

  (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
   f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i)) =
f lastelement - f firstelement

  (λ i : ⟦ 0 ⟧,

f lastelement - f firstelement
 
f: ⟦ 1 ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
0 = f firstelement - f firstelement

e: is_stn_increasing f
f firstelement - f firstelement = 0

    apply minuseq0'.

f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement

  (λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,

m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) +
(f (dni_firstelement lastelement) -
 f (dni_lastelement lastelement)) =
f lastelement - f firstelement

f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) +
(f lastelement - f (dni_lastelement lastelement)) =
f lastelement - f firstelement

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
f lastelement - f (dni_lastelement lastelement) +
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) = f lastelement - f firstelement

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
f lastelement - f (dni_lastelement lastelement) +
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) =
f lastelement - f (dni_lastelement lastelement) +
(f (dni_lastelement lastelement) - f firstelement)
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
f lastelement ≥ f (dni_lastelement lastelement)
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
f (dni_lastelement lastelement) ≥ f firstelement

    
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
f lastelement - f (dni_lastelement lastelement) +
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) =
f lastelement - f (dni_lastelement lastelement) +
(f (dni_lastelement lastelement) - f firstelement)

is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) =
f (dni_lastelement lastelement) - f firstelement

      
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
stnsum
  ((λ i : ⟦ S m ⟧,
    f (dni_firstelement i) - f (dni_lastelement i))
   ∘ dni lastelement) =
stnsum
  (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
   (f ∘ dni_lastelement) (dni_firstelement i) -
   (f ∘ dni_lastelement) (dni_lastelement i))
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
is_stn_increasing (f ∘ dni_lastelement)
m: nat
f: ⟦ S (S m) ⟧ → nat
e: is_stn_increasing f
I: ∏ f : ⟦ S m ⟧ → nat,
is_stn_increasing f
→ stnsum
    (λ i : ⟦ m ⟧,
     f (dni_firstelement i) -
     f (dni_lastelement i)) =
  f lastelement - f firstelement
(f ∘ dni_lastelement) lastelement -
(f ∘ dni_lastelement) firstelement =
f (dni_lastelement lastelement) - f firstelement

f: incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧)
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i

(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i

f: incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ n ⟧
f i = i

(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
f i = i

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
f i = i
 
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
is_stn_strictly_increasing (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)

f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j

→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
f i = i

→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
is_stn_strictly_increasing (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
 
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
isincl (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
is_stn_increasing (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)

      
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
isincl (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
 use (isinclcomp f (stntonat_incl _)).

 exact inc. } 
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
f i = i

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f i = i

    
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧

→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i

  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n

  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
f i = i

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i

  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
j, j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
isofhlevel 0 (j = j')

      
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
j, j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
isaprop (j = j')

L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
j, j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
j = j'

      
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
j, j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
isaprop (j = j')
 apply isaset_hfiber; apply isasetstn.

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
j, j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : ⟦ n ⟧,
   (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x0 = x)

f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)

x: ⟦ n ⟧
j, j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
pr1 j = pr1 j'

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x: ⟦ n ⟧
j, j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
x0: ⟦ n ⟧
isaprop (make_stn n (f'' x0) (L x0) = x)
 apply isasetstn.

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: make_stn n (f'' j) (L j) = x
j': hfiber (λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j)) x
pr1 (j,, e) = pr1 j'
 
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: make_stn n (f'' j) (L j) = x
j': ⟦ n ⟧
e': make_stn n (f'' j') (L j') = x
pr1 (j,, e) = pr1 (j',, e')

f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)

(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i

  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)

L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n

  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat

x, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: make_stn n (f'' j) (L j) = x
j': ⟦ n ⟧
e': make_stn n (f'' j') (L j') = x
j = j'

           
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
x, j: ⟦ n ⟧
e: make_stn n (f'' j) (L j) = x
j': ⟦ n ⟧
e': make_stn n (f'' j') (L j') = x
f'' j = f'' j'

           apply (base_paths _ _ (e @ !e')). 
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
J: isincl f'
f i = i

n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
J: isincl f'
∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧,
i ≤ j → make_incl f' J i ≤ make_incl f' J j

      
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
J: isincl f'
j, j': ⟦ n ⟧
lt: j ≤ j'
make_incl f' J j ≤ make_incl f' J j'
 
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat

J: isincl f'
j, j': ⟦ n ⟧
lt: j ≤ j'
pr1
  (make_incl (dni lastelement)
     (isincldni n lastelement)) j
≤ pr1
    (make_incl (dni lastelement)
       (isincldni n lastelement)) j'

      
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat

J: isincl f'
j, j': ⟦ n ⟧
lt: j ≤ j'
pr1 (dni lastelement j) ≤ pr1 (dni lastelement j')

→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)
M: f lastelement = n
L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n
f'':= inclcomp
  (inclcomp
     (make_incl (dni lastelement)
        (isincldni n lastelement)) f)
  (make_incl (stntonat (S n))
     (isinclstntonat (S n))): incl (⟦ n ⟧) nat
f':= λ j : ⟦ n ⟧, make_stn n (f'' j) (L j): ⟦ n ⟧ → ⟦ n ⟧
J: isincl f'
j, j': ⟦ n ⟧
lt: j ≤ j'
j ≤ j'
 assumption. 
n: nat
f: incl (⟦ S n ⟧) (⟦ S n ⟧)
inc: ∏ i j : ⟦ S n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j
i: ⟦ S n ⟧
I: ∏ f : incl (⟦ n ⟧) (⟦ n ⟧),
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i
strincr: is_stn_strictly_increasing
  (λ x : ⟦ S n ⟧, f x)

L: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f (dni lastelement j) < n

J: isincl f'
F: ∏ j : ⟦ n ⟧, f' j = j
f i = i

n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i


n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ ≃ ⟦ n ⟧
(∏ i j : ⟦ n ⟧, i ≤ j → f i ≤ f j)
→ ∏ i : ⟦ n ⟧, f i = i

  apply (stn_ord_inj (weqtoincl f)).
Defined.

(* Functions with domain in Standard finite sets. *)
Definition fun_stnsn_to_stnn {X : UU} {n : nat} (f : stn (S n) → X) : stn n → X := f ∘ dni_lastelement.


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
¬ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
→ ⟦ n ⟧ → singleton_complement (f lastelement)


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
¬ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
→ ⟦ n ⟧ → singleton_complement (f lastelement)

  
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
X0: ¬ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
X1: ⟦ n ⟧
singleton_complement (f lastelement)

  
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
X0: ¬ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
X1: ⟦ n ⟧
singleton_complement (f lastelement)
  (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f X1)

  
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
X0: ¬ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
X1: ⟦ n ⟧
contra: fun_stnsn_to_stnn f X1 = f lastelement
∅
 
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
X0: ¬ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
X1: ⟦ n ⟧
contra: fun_stnsn_to_stnn f X1 = f lastelement
hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)

  
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
X0: ¬ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
X1: ⟦ n ⟧
contra: fun_stnsn_to_stnn f X1 = f lastelement
fun_stnsn_to_stnn f ?x = f lastelement
 apply contra.
Defined.


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
y: X
isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber f y)


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
y: X
isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber f y)

  
n: nat
∏ (X : UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → X) (y : X),
isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber f y)

  
X: UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
x: X
deceqX: isdeceq X
decidable (hfiber f x)
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X : UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → X) 
(y : X), isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber f y)
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
deceqX: isdeceq X
decidable (hfiber f x)

  
X: UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
x: X
deceqX: isdeceq X
decidable (hfiber f x)
 
X: UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
x: X
deceqX: isdeceq X
¬ hfiber f x
 
X: UU
f: ⟦ 0 ⟧ → X
x: X
deceqX: isdeceq X
contra: hfiber f x
∅
 eapply weqstn0toempty, pr1, contra.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X : UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → X) 
(y : X), isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber f y)
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
deceqX: isdeceq X
decidable (hfiber f x)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X : UU) (f : ⟦ n ⟧ → X) 
(y : X), isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber f y)
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
deceqX: isdeceq X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
decidable (hfiber f x)
 
n: nat
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g x)
deceqX: isdeceq X
decidable (hfiber f x)

    
n: nat
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g x)
deceqX: isdeceq X
H:= IHn deceqX: decidable (hfiber g x)
decidable (hfiber f x)

    
n: nat
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g x)
deceqX: isdeceq X
a: hfiber g x
decidable (hfiber f x)
n: nat
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g x)
deceqX: isdeceq X
b: ¬ hfiber g x
decidable (hfiber f x)

b: ¬ hfiber g (f (m,, lth))

a: m < n
(f ∘ dni_lastelement) (m,, a) = f (m,, lth)
 
n: nat
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X

lth: m < S n

deceqX: isdeceq X
b: ¬ hfiber g (f (m,, lth))
b0: f lastelement != f (m,, lth)
a: m < n
f (dni_lastelement (m,, a)) = f (m,, lth)

           apply maponpaths, stn_eq, idpath.
        
n: nat
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g x)
deceqX: isdeceq X
b: ¬ hfiber g x
b0: f lastelement != x
m: nat
lth: m < S n
eq: f (m,, lth) = x
b1: m = n
∅

X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g x)
deceqX: isdeceq X

n: nat
X: UU
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
x: X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ n ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g x)
deceqX: isdeceq X
b: ¬ hfiber g x
b0: f lastelement != x
m: nat
lth: m < S n
eq: f (m,, lth) = x
b1: m = n
f (n,, natgthsnn n) = x
 
X: UU
m: nat
lth: m < S m
f: ⟦ S m ⟧ → X
g:= fun_stnsn_to_stnn f: ⟦ m ⟧ → X
IHn: isdeceq X → decidable (hfiber g (f (m,, lth)))
deceqX: isdeceq X
b: ¬ hfiber g (f (m,, lth))
b0: f lastelement != f (m,, lth)
f (m,, natgthsnn m) = f (m,, lth)

           apply maponpaths, stn_eq, idpath.
Qed.


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
isdeceq X
→ issurjective f
  → hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
    → issurjective (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f)


X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
isdeceq X
→ issurjective f
  → hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
    → issurjective (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f)

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
deceqX: isdeceq X
surj: issurjective f
x: hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f lastelement)
issurjective (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f)

f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
deceqX: isdeceq X
surj: issurjective f
x: ⟦ n ⟧
eq: fun_stnsn_to_stnn f x = f lastelement
issurjective (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f)

x: ⟦ n ⟧
eq: fun_stnsn_to_stnn f x = f lastelement
y': X
∥ hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) y' ∥

f (dni_lastelement (m,, a)) = f (m,, lth)
 apply maponpaths, stn_eq, idpath.
    
X: UU
n: nat
f: ⟦ S n ⟧ → X
deceqX: isdeceq X

y': X

hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) y'
 
X: UU
m: nat
lth: m < S m
f: ⟦ S m ⟧ → X
b: f lastelement != f (m,, lth)
deceqX: isdeceq X
surj: issurjective f
x: ⟦ m ⟧
eq: fun_stnsn_to_stnn f x = f lastelement
hfiber (fun_stnsn_to_stnn f) (f (m,, lth))
 
X: UU
m: nat
lth: m < S m
f: ⟦ S m ⟧ → X
b: f lastelement != f (m,, lth)
deceqX: isdeceq X
surj: issurjective f
x: ⟦ m ⟧
eq: fun_stnsn_to_stnn f x = f lastelement
f lastelement = f (m,, lth)
 
      apply maponpaths, stn_eq, idpath.
Qed.
